Delivers first class music with slick choreography and an amazing band for a stunning ‘not to be missed’ Motown experience.  Seen by over one million people this show will have you Dancing On The Ceiling with songs from legendary artistes such as The Temptations, Stevie Wonder, The Four Tops, Smokey Robinson, Marvin Gaye, The Jackson Five, The Isley Brothers, Edwin Starr and many more!  ‘They had the moves, the looks, the voices and every Motown Classic you could ask for’ Jersey Evening News, Sarah Harding  The ULTIMATE celebration of the sweet sound of Motown  Let’s Get Ready... to Go Loco, Down in Acapulco

title: Sky Full Of Stars
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Get ready for an electrifying night of music and magic with Sky Full of Stars—the most authentic tribute to Coldplay! This spectacular live experience doesn’t just capture the sound and spirit of one of the world’s biggest bands—it makes you part of the show. With LED wristbands lighting up the crowd, the energy of the music surrounds you like never before!

Whether you’re a lifelong Coldplay fan or just looking for an unforgettable night out, Sky Full of Stars delivers dazzling performances, stunning visuals, and an atmosphere that truly brings Coldplay’s greatest hits to life. From the anthemic Viva La Vida to the uplifting A Sky Full of Stars, plus all the songs you love, including Clocks, Yellow, Paradise, and Hymn for the Weekend.

So, grab your tickets, bring your friends, and get ready for a night packed with music, energy, and moments you won’t forget.

title: The Mousetrap
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Since 1952, Agatha Christie’s The Mousetrap has captivated the world with silent clues, shifting shadows and the best kept secret in theatre history. Now, the record-breaking classic embarks on its 75th Anniversary Tour across the UK and Ireland.

A shocking murder rattles London. Far from the chaos, a remote country guesthouse welcomes seven strangers seeking refuge. But when a police sergeant battles through a deadly snowstorm with a warning no one expects, it becomes clear the threat is already within their walls.
Every whisper hides a clue. Every story masks a lie. And as suspicion tightens its grip, one question chills the room:
Who among them is capable of murder?

Step inside, and solve the greatest murder mystery that has kept the world guessing for generations.

THE MANOR AWAITS

title: Fascinating Aïda
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
The world’s greatest cabaret troupe is back with a BRAND NEW SHOW! 

Devilishly funny and gloriously glamorous  Dillie, Liza and Adèle, with Michael Roulston on piano, are back on the road following their hugely successful 40th Anniversary Tour.  

With brand new songs generated by human neural networks and using their combined deep-learning age of 278 years, they have data-mined their back catalogue to bring audiences their greatest, most sensationally analogue show ever!  

As the saying goes … when the world is going to sh*t, be sure to book tickets to see Fascinating Aïda!

title: Michael Starring Ben
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Take a journey back in time to remember Michael Jackson – the man, the music and the magic. Michael Starring Ben is a hit theatre production starring the UK's ultimate Michael Jackson tribute star, Ben Bowman. Not only does he look and sound like the King of Pop, but he's honed his routine so carefully that audiences truly believe they are watching Michael Jackson himself. The show features a live band, dazzling costumes and the performer's iconic dance routines. It also showcases the greatest hits of Michael Jackson and also of The Jackson 5 including Beat It, Billie Jean, Thriller and Man in the Mirror. Please note that this is a tribute production not associated with or endorsed by the Michael Jackson Estate.

title: Showaddywaddy
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: ‘The Greatest Rock & Roll Band In The World’ is a bold statement, but Showaddywaddy has lived up to that title for the last 5 decades! Formed in Leicester in 1973 from an amalgamation of several local bands, Showaddywaddy have gone on to sell more than 20 million records and tour all four corners of the globe. Their live show is dynamic and uplifting, featuring all of their greatest hits, many of which reached number one in the pop charts across Europe. ‘Under The Moon of Love’, ‘Three Steps to Heaven’, ‘Hey Rock & Roll’, ‘When’, ‘Blue Moon’, ‘Pretty Little Angel Eyes’ and many, many more. So come and join the ‘Dancin’ Party’… ‘You’ve Got What It Takes’!

title: Thank You For The Music
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: THANK YOU FOR THE MUSIC The Ultimate Tribute to ABBA Calling all Dancing Queens, this is your night to say, Thank you for the Music! This international smash-hit tribute show brings all ABBA’s number one hits to the stage in a production like no other. The hugely popular show, now in its 22nd year, combines the unmistakable harmonies, colourful costumes, and dazzling performances by our all-star cast. Join us for the party of the year, you can dance, you can jive, and have the time of your life as we bring you all the hits, including Waterloo, Dancing Queen, Super Trouper, Mamma Mia, Knowing Me, Knowing You, Gimme, Gimme, Gimme, The Winner Takes It All and many many more! Thank you for the Music! For without a song or a dance what are we! Touring the nation. Tickets on sale now!  This is a tribute show and is no way affiliated with any original artists/estates/management companies or similar shows. Promoter reserves the right to alter the programme.

title: The Eternal Shame Of Sue Perkins
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: You may know her as Bake-Off Sue, Taskmaster Sue, Just A Minute Sue, or the Sue that gives you travel envy - but stand-up Sue is full of surprises. In this show about stigma, humiliation and misunderstanding, Sue shares hilarious stories from behind the TV cameras.  What’s the fallout when your pituitary gland goes haywire on live TV? How do you convince the public you didn’t really fall onto that hoover attachment? And when intimate photos get splashed all over the internet, how do you switch the shame to dignity and joy?  Age restriction: 16+

title: Hamza Yassin - My Life Behind The Lens
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
“My mission is to get people outside and experience the wonder of the natural world.  Immersing yourself in nature is an effective antidote to the anxieties of modern life” - HAMZA YASSIN 

Join wildlife cameraman and presenter Hamza Yassin on a new adventure as he takes to the stage for his first nationwide theatre tour “My Life Behind the Lens”. Hamza will share his infectious sense of wonder and most precious memories both in life and in nature.   

“My Life Behind the Lens” promises to be an unforgettable show filled with adventure, storytelling, and stunning wonders from the natural world.   

Hamza brings a fresh perspective to the natural world, and he truly believes that by engaging people in the joy of Mother Nature and what she has to offer, we can all gain a fresh perspective on the world around us and how we can protect it together.   

Hamza shares behind the scenes tales from his epic filming expeditions across the globe. Packed with breathtaking footage, fascinating insights, charming personal stories, and with a deep passion for nature, he invites audiences of all ages to reconnect with the wild world around them.  This unique live experience offers a rare glimpse into the life and work of one of Britain’s most beloved natural history storytellers.

title: Ukrainian National Opera: Tosca
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Music by Giacomo Puccini Sung in Italian with English Surtitles Set against the magnificent backdrop of Rome, Puccini's Tosca is one of the most thrilling and dramatic operas ever written. Combining romance, political intrigue and extraordinary music, it remains one of the most popular works in the operatic repertoire and one of the greatest nights out in live theatre. The opera follows the celebrated singer Floria Tosca and her lover, the artist Mario Cavaradossi, as they are drawn into a dangerous world of suspicion, corruption and control. When Cavaradossi becomes involved with an escaped political prisoner, both lovers fall into the hands of the ruthless Baron Scarpia, a man determined to possess Tosca and destroy anyone who stands in his way. As jealousy, passion and power collide, Tosca is forced to make an impossible choice between love and survival. The result is a gripping story of sacrifice, betrayal and destiny, building towards one of the most unforgettable finales in all opera. Puccini's score is a masterpiece of theatrical intensity, filled with soaring melody, dramatic orchestral writing and moments of extraordinary emotional power. Featuring the immortal aria Vissi d'arte, Tosca offers some of the most passionate and memorable music ever composed. This spectacular production by the Dnipro Opera features lavish costumes, impressive sets, outstanding international soloists and the full richness of a live orchestra, bringing Puccini's masterpiece vividly to life. A thrilling evening of romance, suspense and unforgettable music.

title: Simon Brodkin: Unleashed
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
He’s the comedian who showered FIFA president Sepp Blatter with cash, handed Prime Minister Theresa May her P45, and created the smash-hit BBC comedy series Lee Nelson’s Well Good Show. 

Simon is now one of the most exciting stand-up comedians in the world to see live. His last tour, ‘Screwed Up’, was a phenomenal success. Extended three times, it ran for 170 dates around the world, culminating in three sold out nights at London’s Hammersmith Apollo. 

‘Unleashed’ is Simon’s hysterical new show. Packed with outrageous punchlines and electric crowdwork, Simon rips into wild swimmers, vape shops, Greta Thunberg, religion and his wife’s friends Claire & Carl. 

Join Simon for a wildly funny night on his biggest ever tour. 

Don’t miss out. Book now! 

Age restriction: 14+
Ticket Limit is 10 per transaction

title: A Christmas Carol Goes Wrong
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
The Cornley Amateur Drama Society are back with tidings of chaos and joy, ready to tackle the Charles Dickens' classic, A Christmas Carol. 

The sell-out West End smash hit production of CHRISTMAS CAROL GOES WRONG crashes into the New Theatre Cardiff. Don’t miss this guaranteed Christmas catastrophe from Mischief, the multi award-winning company behind The Play That Goes Wrong, Peter Pan Goes Wrong and The Comedy About a Bank Robbery. 

As the Cornley crew hilariously battle miscommunication, delays to their set, actors missing in action and a growing feud over who will play the lead, it’s sure to be a disastrous take on the much-loved classic Christmas story of Ebenezer Scrooge. Will Cornley finally change their ways, or will their misfortunes wreak havoc with hysterical consequences. 

Enjoy a festive slice of pure escapism at the worst production in Christmas past, present and yet to come! Don’t be a Scrooge, book now.

title: Wet Wet Wet - Celebrating 40 Years Of 'Popped In Souled Out'
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Wet Wet Wet celebrate the 40th anniversary of their iconic debut album Popped In Souled Out - the record that announced them to the world and launched one of Britain’s most successful pop careers.  

Released in 1987, the album that introduced Wet Wet Wet to not only a national audience, but a global one too. It reached No.1 on the UK Albums Chart and featured the hit singles Wishing I Was Lucky, Sweet Little Mystery, Angel Eyes and Temptation.  

The band will perform songs from Popped In Souled Out alongside a catalogue of beloved hits spanning their remarkable career. The show will celebrate both where it all began, as well as what followed.  

The band today features founding member Graeme Clark, long-standing guitarist Graeme Duffin, and lead vocalist Kevin Simm. Together, they continue to perform the songs that first made their name while introducing them to new audiences.  

Special guest The South. 

VIP M&G ticket includes:
4.30pm start time
Exclusive Wet Wet Wet sound check experience
Meet & Greet with Wet Wet Wet, including photo opportunity (using own camera or smart phone)
Signed A4 tour print from Wet Wet Wet
Souvenir VIP laminate and lanyard
Includes ticket to the show within the front 4 rows.

title: Varna International Ballet - Swan Lake
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Raymond Gubbay presents  Varna International Ballet returns for a new season in 2027 brought to life by magical special effects.  Performed by Varna International Ballet. Accompanied by a live orchestra - Varna International Ballet Orchestra.  The greatest romantic ballet of all time is brought to life by Tchaikovsky’s haunting and unforgettable score. From the impressive splendor of the palace ballroom to the moon-lit lake where swans glide in perfect formation, this compelling tale of tragic romance has it all. From Odile, the temptress in black tulle as she seduces the Prince by spinning with captivating precision to the spellbound purity of the swan queen, Odette as she flutters with emotional intensity, the dual role of Odette/Odile is one of ballet’s most unmissable technical challenges.  Varna International Ballet & Orchestra:  Founded in 1947, the critically acclaimed Varna International Ballet returns to the UK following a breathtaking debut tour. Renowned for its award-winning soloists and magnificent corps de ballet, the company has been delighting audiences for decades at home and abroad with its performances of the highest quality.

title: Gary Delaney: Gary On Laughing
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Gary Delaney’s last UK tour ran for two and a half years across 378 dates. People laughed a lot and kept coming back. His videos have hundreds of millions of views. So now he’s doing it all again with a brand new show. All new jokes and utterly splendid filth. Come along. It’ll be fun. Don’t bring the kids or people who like to get their knickers in a twist. Do wear a TENA pad or dark trousers.

title: The Classic Rock Show 2027
promoter: CMP Entertainment t/a Cole Music Productions (UK) Ltd
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Featuring The Beatles, Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Queen, The Rolling Stones, AC/DC, The Eagles, Dire Straits, Meat Loaf, Van Halen, The Who, Lynyrd Skynyrd, ZZ Top, Fleetwood Mac and more An amazing opportunity for rock fans, young and old, to celebrate three decades of the world’s greatest classic rock music with a stunning multi-million dollar sound and light show to match. Note-for-note, anthem after anthem and riff after riff - culminating in a show-stopping guitar duel, that is definitely not to be missed. 'Utterly Brilliant In Every Way’ Chicago Tribune 'A Gem Of A Rock Show’ YouTube

title: Scott Bennett: Stuff
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: As a society we love stuff, it’s a statement about who we are and who we want to be. But apparently, this message is at odds with the looming environmental crisis. We’re now struggling to balance these worlds, to focus on the things that bring us real connections and nourish the soul. Award-winning comedian and award-winning Product Designer, Scott Bennett is desperately trying to cleanse his life of stuff, but is this even possible anymore?  Tour support for Micky Flanagan, Rob Brydon Jason Manford, and John Bishop. The star of Live at the Apollo, The News Quiz, The Now Show, The Ultimate Choice and Chortle Best Club Comedian Nominee 2022.

title: Boyband in the Buff
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Boyband in the Buff is the ultimate throwback concert with a cheeky twist - starring pop heartthrob Gareth Gates alongside a cast of seriously talented (and seriously ripped) performers. Stripped back to nothing but slick harmonies, killer choreography and undeniable charisma, the boys bring the biggest hits of the ‘90s and ‘00s to life. Think Backstreet Boys, NSYNC, Westlife and Take That - but hotter. This is nostalgia turned all the way up. A high-energy celebration of pop, passion and perfectly sculpted physiques, where the layers drop and the temperature rises. If you’ve ever had a boyband crush… this is your night.

title: Rick Wakeman - The Wizard Of Prog
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Ultimate Highlights Concert Tour feat The English Rock Ensemble Keyboard player extraordinaire Rick Wakeman CBE and the English Rock Ensemble will be touring the UK with The Wizard of Prog – Ultimate Highlights Concert Tour.  The setlist will feature a broad sweep across Rick’s classic back catalogue, including extracts from his epic concept albums like Journey To The Centre Of The Earth and The Myths & Legends of King Arthur & The Knights Of The Round Table and other solo work, as well as music he recorded with YES – and of course, a few surprises along the way!  Fans are promised a magical night of music spanning over 50 years of the Wizard Of Prog’s stellar career, brought bang-up-to-date by a group of spell-binding musicians whose alchemy on stage is irresistible. 

Age restriction: under 16s must always be accompanied by an adult aged 18 or over.

title: Before I Go To Sleep
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Acclaimed actor, author and podcaster Giovanna Fletcher stars in the world stage premiere of Before I Go To Sleep. Based on the international bestselling novel that became a hit film starring Nicole Kidman, this thrilling new adaptation comes to New Theatre Cardiff.  Christine appears to have an idyllic life…with one terrible exception. Every night, when she goes to sleep, she loses her memory. Every morning she wakes up remembering nothing from the last 20 years of her life - not even the loving husband lying next to her. As she desperately tries to piece her life back together, hidden and terrifying truths begin to emerge, forcing her to question everything and everyone around her.  From the team behind the hugely successful stage adaptation of The Girl on the Train, this tense, fast-paced psychological thriller explores the fragile vulnerability of memory, identity and trust, with twists and turns that will keep you gripped until its shocking climax.  PG 15+. This production contains some strong language and some scenes that depict traumatic events, physical altercation and psychological manipulation.
Please contact  https://trafalgartickets.com/new-theatre-cardiff/en-GB/contact-us  if you have any concerns.

title: Amadeus
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Salieri has everything - until he hears Mozart. "This was a music I'd never heard. Filled with such longing, such unfulfillable longing, it had me trembling.”  A genius he cannot rival. A gift he believes is divine. Admiration turns to obsession, and obsession to destruction - as he sets out to ruin the man he both worships and despises. Starring Michael Sheen and Callum Scott Howells, this is the first major revival of Peter Shaffer’s iconic play in over a decade - a searing story of envy, ambition and the cost of greatness.

title: Jon Culshaw: Me, Myself & Others
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Jon Culshaw is taking to the road with a brand-new show for 2027. Join the star of BBC Radio 4’s Dead Ringers as he takes you on a whistle stop tour through an array of famous voices in an evening of stand-up, stories, sketches and song!  Jon is one of Britains most critically acclaimed impressionists, comedians and actors with television credits ranging from such classic comedy series such as Spitting Image, The Impressions Show, and Newzoids, through to Channel 4’s award winning docudrama Partygate. On stage, in addition to his hugely successful solo comedy tour Imposter Syndrome, in recent years Jon has also played to packed houses in the one man play Les Dawson: Flying High, the Dead Ringers 25th Anniversary Tour, and the iconic London Palladium pantomime. Book now to see one of the country’s most renowned and diverse performers live! Presented by Fiery Entertainment by arrangement with Siren Talent.

title: Francis Rossi
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Francis Rossi’s ‘Songbook: Quo – Past, Present, Future’ has been extended into 2027. The Francis Rossi ‘Songbook: Quo – Past, Present, Future’ shows will include, of course, a hand-picked host of Francis’ many evergreen Status Quo classics, some deep cuts; and he is also working up a new medley.  This tour is the only place to hear Francis’ own selections and interpretations from his incredible catalogue, plus the added bonus of some commentary and insight from the man himself. Francis Rossi said, “I am delighted to extend this run on from the thirty dates already announced for later this year. The pressure is on once more, as I have put together a really packed new show. I have really enjoyed taking the current show into Europe but can’t wait to get back out on the road in the UK again with this one. I’ll be keeping a whole lot of the hits in the set, of course, but also mixing it up with a couple of curveballs. These theatre shows are a great way to really connect with the audience, and try something a little bit different.”  Francis Rossi will once again be joined on this whole tour by guitarist Andy Brook, who co-produced the critically acclaimed 2026 album ‘The Accidental’ with Francis, and appeared on the sold out 2025 ‘Songbook’ tour. The Francis Rossi ‘Songbook: Quo – Past, Present, Future’ Tour 2026-2027 is a great opportunity for fans to hear many all-time favourites from one of rock’s greatest songwriters, as well as some unexpected gems, it’s a journey through the incredible career of a true one-off artist. The VIP Soundcheck Experience ticket will include: Exclusive access to soundcheck which will include a performance of 2 songs not featured in the show  Stage / tech rundown with Francis’ sound engineer One of the best seats in the house for the main show A limited-edition signed 7” single available only with the VIP ticket on tour An exclusive VIP tour lanyard

title: Ed Gamble: Fresh Hell
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Everyone’s annoying cousin, Ed Gamble, is going back on tour in 2027 across the UK & Ireland with some more of his stand-up grot. So come and see the self-appointed Crown Prince of Visualised Companion Podcasts harrumph about the stage. Co-host of the award-winning mega-hit podcast Off Menu with James Acaster, host of visualised spin-offs The Traitors: Uncloaked and Taskmaster The Podcast, as well as new upcoming panel show Unacceptable airing this summer, Ed’s brand-new tour, Fresh Hell, follows his biggest ever sold-out world tour across Europe, North America and Australasia.

title: Victoria Wood's dinnerladies
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: A brand new stage adaptation starring stage and TV favourite Les Dennis as maintenance man Stan, with the full cast of dinnerladies to be announced.  More than 25 years after it first aired on BBC One, Victoria Wood's much-loved sitcom dinnerladies is heading to the stage, in the first piece of Victoria’s work to be produced by her estate.  Featuring a story inspired by the original TV series’, the show brings back all the characters audiences know and love from the Manchester canteen.  Originally written by and starring Victoria Wood, dinnerladies became one of Britain's most adored comedies thanks to its sharp humour, warmth and brilliantly observed characters.  Now Stan, Bren, Tony, Dolly, Jean, Twinkle, Anita and the rest of the canteen crew are back for a fresh helping of laughs, chaos and classic Victoria Wood comedy.  Whether you're revisiting an old favourite or discovering it for the first time, dinnerladies serves up a hilarious night out packed with heart, nostalgia and plenty of surprises.

title: Ben Portsmouth: This Is Elvis
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Ben Portsmouth brings the ultimate Elvis experience to Cardiff! Ben is not just a tribute artist; he is regarded as the closest living performer to the legendary Elvis Presley. With global success in over 20 countries, Ben Portsmouth brings energy, passion and authenticity in a way that no one else can deliver. Making history in 2012, Ben broke records becoming the first European to be crowned by Elvis Presley Enterprises as the ‘Worldwide Ultimate Elvis Tribute Artist’ in Memphis, which swiftly followed with an invite to headline a special Elvis week on the Late Show with David Letterman. This is Elvis offers an immersive journey through Presley's most iconic eras with greatest hits from his early rockabilly roots to the dazzling Vegas years. Whether you’re a lifelong Elvis fan or just discovering his music, this is a show for all generations! Ben and the Taking Care of Elvis Band brings you a dynamic and unforgettable experience that enthusiasts all over the world claim, 'feels like a live concert with the King himself'. Trust us, you won't be able to resist Ben's looks, charm and charisma! Having witnessed sellout performances on the same Vegas stage as Elvis, to London's West End, don’t miss out on your chance to see This is Elvis - book now for an unforgettable night that will have you all shook up. Due to adult themes and humour, parental guidance is advised. Under 16s must be accompanied by an adult 18+ (strictly no under 6s).

title: Pip And Posy Live
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: From the producers of The Smartest Giant in Town comes a brand-new theatre show bursting with friendship and fun, Pip and Posy Live on Stage.  Inspired by the BAFTA nominated animated series from Magic Light Pictures and based on the picture books by multi-award-winning illustrator Axel Scheffler (The Gruffalo) this exciting new live stage show celebrates the power of imagination, kindness, and creativity for little ones and families everywhere.  Pip and Posy are best friends whose lives revolve around the world of play. Their stories are a joyful celebration of friendship in all its forms - the laughter, the ups and downs, the silliness, and care. Together with their friends Mo and Jamila, they head off on a thrilling adventure through tangled jungles, across slimy swamps, and high above the clouds aboard a big red balloon. Just watch out, the Troll is after the treasure!  Packed with toe-tapping songs, stunning puppetry, and irresistible interactive play, Pip and Posy are waiting for you. Come on, let’s play!  @pipandposylive  PipandPosyLive.co.uk  PipandPosyLive.com

title: Dianne And Vito Back In Business
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: After whirlwind seasons on and off the dance floor, Dianne and Vito are heading back on tour with a spectacular new show - bigger, bolder and more exhilarating than ever.  Back in Business explodes with the passion, personality and electric chemistry that have made this dynamic duo audience favourites. A dazzling celebration of dance, music and laughter, the show reunites two of the UK’s most magnetic performers for a night packed with breathtaking choreography, playful comedy and irresistible charm, not to mention the genuine chemistry you only get when best friends share the stage.  From fiery Latin to timeless ballroom - and everything in between - every routine bursts with style, storytelling and emotion. Created by Dianne and Vito alongside world-class choreographers and a visionary artistic team, this spectacular production delivers show-stopping moments, sensational creativity and stories that linger long after the final curtain.  Heading to Cardiff in spring, Back in Business promises glamour, rhythm and pure joy in one unforgettable evening.  Book your tickets now and experience Dianne and Vito back where they belong - centre stage!

title: Al Murray: All You Need Is Guv
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Hey cool cats! Hot on the heels of a sold-out first leg of his brand-new stand-up show across 2026, The Guv's extending his tour of these green and groovy isles into 2027. Time for another round, wouldn’t you say? There’s no denying the world’s a mess daddio, but there is a glimmer of hope as the globe’s favourite Pub Landlord returns with his like-nobody-else Common Sense hot-takes for the masses, offering a much-needed truth tonic (pint for the fella/glass of white wine for the lady) for these whacked out and troubled times. With a fresh and frothing pint to hand, a barrel of laughs to pour from, and a flower in his heart, Guv is all you need. And for the brave, bold, and plain straight crazy cats amongst you who want a proper taste of the action, be part of THE SPLASH ZONE*. These tickets are front-and-centre, so when the Guv sets the world to rights with a pint in hand, it won’t just be wisdom showering down on you. Book ‘em quick and wear the damn poncho. (Ticket includes tour poncho, a souvenir lanyard and some exclusive digital content from the Guv himself) *Splashing not guaranteed Age Restriction 16+

title: Man In The Mirror - A Tribute To Michael Jackson
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Join us for a Thriller of an evening, as we celebrate the legendary music of the KING OF POP.

This is the “Man in the Mirror” – The brand new must-see, electrifying tribute concert to Michael Jackson. 

Starring CJ, one of the world’s greatest Michael Jackson Tribute Artists and supported by a talented cast of performers and musicians who capture the essence of Michael Jackson's unique style and charisma like no other, in this scintillating production that will keep you on the edge of your seats.

Featuring all his greatest hits you know and love, including "Thriller," "Billie Jean," "Beat It," "Smooth Criminal," and of course, "Man in the Mirror." Complete with dazzling choreography, stunning visual effects, light show and authentic costumes. This is the show that pays tribute to Jackson's musical legacy.

So, whether you're a lifelong fan or experiencing the magic of Michael Jackson for the first time, get ready as we take you back in time, for a night like no other. 

Brand new from Entertainers.

title: Troy Hawke: Never Stop, Never Change!
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Following last year’s sellout world tour, Troy Hawke is back to his globe sweeping in 2027 with new show Never Stop, Never Change! Angry security guards, barked compliments and crossed wires abound as Troy navigates various conversational minefields, both online and in real life.  ‘I like the videos but how does it translate to the stage?’  COME AND FIND OUT FOR YOURSELF

title: The Story Of Guitar Heroes
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
The UK’s No.1 guitar anthems concert The Story of Guitar Heroes returns on their 10th anniversary tour.  This epic guitar-fest journeys through five decades of iconic music from 1950s Rock & Roll to the most influential guitar heroes of the modern era. 

Renowned for their technical prowess, The Story of Guitar Heroes utilises no less than 35 authentic guitars, recreating the unique sounds of each guitar legend with incredible accuracy. 

Featuring classic hits from legends Hank Marvin, Eric Clapton, Jimi Hendrix, Brian May, Jimmy Page, Mark Knopfler, David Gilmour, Ritchie Blackmore, Tony Iommi, Van Halen, Slash and many more.

title: Giovanni - Unstoppable
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
He’s back… and more unstoppable than ever.

Giovanni Pernice returns in 2027 with his brand new live tour – UNSTOPPABLE.

The Strictly Come Dancing champion and BAFTA winner is ready to set the stage alight once again in a spectacular show packed with passion, precision and pure entertainment.

Joined by a world-class cast of professional dancers and West End performers, Giovanni delivers a high-energy production like no other.

A spectacular show of non-stop action-packed entertainment – this is Giovanni at his absolute best.

Dancer. Performer. Showman.
Giovanni is UNSTOPPABLE. 

VIP Meet & Greet ticket includes pre show M&G at 5.15pm, VIP lanyard, signed autograph and photo opportunities.

title: Count Arthur Strong - And It's Goodnight From Me!
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Count Arthur Strong in And It’s Goodnight from Me! The second part of Count Arthur Strong's Farewell Tour of the World (Including the north-east).  Count Arthur Strong continues on for one last time, as he says what just might be his final goodbye, to whoever’s listening. Don’t miss this potentially wonderful event. Because if you do miss it, you can’t say you were there, like some people do.  NB. Bring a hankie because you might get emotional.  Presented by Live Nation & Komedia Entertainment.

title: Ian Gillan - Talking Gib'rish Tour
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Ian Gillan will bring his new tour, Talking Gib'rish, to Cardiff in May. This very special series of live speaking events will allow audiences to hear personal stories from Ian’s remarkable life and career in music.  From his childhood in Hounslow to the global rise of Deep Purple, Ian will reflect on the experiences, music and outlook on life that shaped one of rock’s most influential careers. The tour offers a rare chance to hear directly from a true music icon.  The Talking Gib'rish tour will offer fans a rare opportunity to hear behind-the-scenes stories from Ian in his own words...candid, humorous, and unfiltered.  Ian said, ‘I am quivering with anticipation at the prospect of embarking on my first ever tour of public speaking engagements. I'll be covering a lot of ground, from my early days in Hounslow to whatever might have happened on the latest world tour with my beloved Deep Purple...and maybe something funky in-between. After 65 years on the road, there will be stories about some of the fascinating and sometimes magical events and people that I've encountered along the trail. It's going to be a blast!’

title: Cirque: The Greatest Show
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Where musical theatre meets circus… Cirque returns with an exciting new production for 2027.  Step into a world where iconic musical theatre favourites meet the skill and artistry of extraordinary circus performers in a vibrant celebration of music, movement, and live entertainment.  Featuring daring acrobatics, impressive balancing acts, powerful live vocals, and striking theatrical moments, this family-friendly production brings together the best of both worlds in one unforgettable show.  With sensational vocalists, world-class international circus artists, and the return of Britain's Got Talent stars Max Fox and Christian Lee, alongside a soundtrack of beloved musical theatre classics, Cirque: The Greatest Show is a spectacular live entertainment experience for audiences of all ages in 2027.

title: Dylan Moran: Looking For Trouble
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Showtime. What are you going to do?

Are you going to go to work? Or stay in bed, chasing oblivion. Guess what?

We're fresh out of oblivion.

The Economy will do fine without you - but how long will you survive without the usual giant horn of frozen caramel latte and the five thousand other pieces of bullshit you have smushed together so you can point at it and croak ‘That’s my ..life?’

Now, now, all this drama and we’re not even out the door yet.

Find out how it could all have been different. Find out how to reclaim your life by becoming a lethal kickboxing, chess champion. Pioneer new trends in global lovemaking, join tan elite band trillionaire poet/pastry chef/mountineers. Just go
LOOKING FOR TROUBLE

A brand new show from BAFTA and Perrier awarding winning comedian & star of Black Books, Dylan Moran.

Age restriction: 16+

title: The Silence Of The Lambs
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
A WORLD STAGE PREMIERE 
Dr Hannibal Lecter will see you now…  Come face to face with the chilling cultural phenomenon The Silence of the Lambs as it makes its world stage play premiere. Based on Thomas Harris’s gripping literary masterpiece, this electrifying new play sets the definitive psychological thriller loose in Cardiff.  Starring John Partridge (EastEnders, Cabaret) as Hannibal Lecter, Mollie Gallagher (Coronation Street) as Clarice Starling, Oliver Farnworth (Emmerdale) as Agent Jack Crawford, and Sam Jackson (Skins) as Buffalo Bill, this gripping new production brings these iconic characters terrifyingly close.  When FBI trainee Clarice Starling is sent to interview the psychiatrist and infamous murderer Hannibal Lecter, it’s hoped his brilliant mind will help catch a sadistic new serial killer, Buffalo Bill. Another girl is missing, and time is running out. But Dr Lecter has questions of his own, and now Clarice must decide: keep a safe distance, or let Hannibal ‘The Cannibal’ into her head…?  Written by the award-winning Gina Gionfriddo and directed by the acclaimed Nikolai Foster, The Silence of the Lambs drips with tension and gets you closer than ever to the iconic thrills and terrifyingly memorable characters of the landmark novel.  The Clock is ticking. Hunt down a ticket and book now…  Before it’s too late.

title: Ed Byrne - No Dramas
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Ed just wants to live a life free of hassles or drama. He feels he’s earned it, but the world has other plans for him.  Come, hear the conquistador of petty gripes air his grievances with a world hell bent on irritating the bejeezus out of us all and, who knows, perhaps it will make you feel better about your own bouts of impotent rage.

title: An Audience With Aggers And Tuffers
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Whether it's a last gasp winner against Nepal, the demolition of Sri Lanka, or falling just short against India, the T20 World Cup showed us that it's never dull talking about English cricket! You won’t want to miss cricket legends Jonathan "Aggers" Agnew and Phil "Tuffers" Tufnell, as they return to the stage for their unmissable 2027 tour. 

Aggers, the iconic BBC cricket correspondent and beloved voice of Test Match Special for over 30 years, will charm you with his sharp wit, impeccable anecdotes and his trademark insider's eye on the game we love. 

Tuffers, former England spin bowler, King of the Jungle, and one of British sport's great characters, will have you in stitches with outrageous tales from his maverick playing days and his second life as one of the nation's favourite media personalities. 

Together, they'll dissect it all: the highs, the lows, the howlers and the heroes. From how Stokes & McCullum will tackle a home summer of tests against New Zealand, India and Pakistan, to the future of English cricket., and from the commentary box to the jungle, no stone will go unturned, and no question is off limits. 

Whether you're a die-hard cricket fan or simply after a brilliant night out, Aggers and Tuffers will not disappoint.  

Age restriction: 12+

title: Henry Paker: Pencil Case
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Little Wander presents…  Henry Paker: Pencil Case  New comedy show from Henry Paker, featuring live illustration.  You’ve looked behind a Wizard’s Curtain. You’ve visited a sausage factory. Do you dare to gaze inside a cartoonist’s pencil case?  Leave your preconceptions about comedy/illustration at the door and expect to find them in an absolute state on the way out.  As heard on Three Bean Salad podcast. As seen on The Last Leg and Russell Howard’s Good News. Cartoons as seen in Joe Wilkinson: My Autobiography and Kay’s Anatomy.

title: Lucy Beaumont - Bad At Quiz Shows, Good With Weirdos
promoter: Land of Green Ginger Productions Ltd
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Lucy Beaumont has had quite the year. She lost a contestant £79,000 on The Wheel, forgot to revise for Mastermind, and generally confirmed she's terrible at quiz shows. So she's sticking with what she does best - this autumn, she's back on the road with a brand new show. Following the success of her sell-out debut UK tour, Lucy returns with Bad at Quiz Shows, Good with Weirdos - an evening packed with chaotic brilliance, mayhem, and beautifully surreal storytelling that's made her one of the UK's most beloved comedians. Expect tales of going into hiding after Celebrity Traitors, creating cow udder couture on The Great British Sewing Bee, and navigating life as someone for whom "normal" has never made much of an appearance. Whether you loved her on Taskmaster, know her from her award-winning sitcom, or just appreciate someone who turns everyday disasters into comedic gold, this is the night out you need. Come for the chaos. Stay for the weirdos.

Age restriction: 14+

title: Alan Carr: Have I Said Too Much?
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Alan Carr is back on tour and his lips are unsealed! With a big mouth and a talent for oversharing, Alan’s ready to dish some drama. Expect stories of dipping into the dating pool, navigating showbiz green rooms and a sprinkling of tales from the Traitors turret. Please note: these shows take place in 2027.

title: Murder Trial Tonight V: Death In The Family
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Murder Trial Tonight V: Death in the Family brings a chilling true story that shocked the world to the stage. A devoted mother and wife is found murdered in her own kitchen - and a member of her own family stands accused. In this immersive courtroom experience, you become part of the jury. Watch and listen as the prosecution and defence present every twist, every argument, and every piece of evidence. Then, it’s your turn to decide. Cast your verdict live via QR code and help determine the outcome But the real question is - did you get it right? Once the audience verdict is in, the truth behind the real-life case is revealed on the big screen. Prepare for a night of tension, drama, and moral dilemma where every decision counts. Warning: Contains disturbing content and imagery related to murder.

title: Joe Lycett: Do You Really Lycett?
promoter: Chambers Management t/a Chambers Touring Ltd
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Chambers Touring Proudly Presents  Joe Lycett: Do You Really Lycett? Is It, Is It Wicked? We’re Lovin’ It, Lovin’ It, Lovin’ It, We’re Lovin’ It Lycett  Joe Lycett is back and he is unleashed! He was leashed! Now the leash has been removed, so there is no leash! Don’t come if you love leashes! You will HATE this show if you want someone on a leash!  Expect jokes, a sprinkling of social justice, some material about being a father and a little bit about being on the Celebrity Traitors.  joelycett.com | @joelycett

title: Singin' In The Rain
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Jonathan Church Theatre Productions presents The Chichester Festival Theatre, Stage Entertainment and Sheffield Theatres production of Singin’ in the Rain, based on the classic Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer film. Screenplay by Betty Comden and Adolph Green. Songs by Nacio Herb Brown and Arthur Freed. Performed by arrangement with Music Theatre International.  A smash-hit in the West End and across the UK, this irresistibly charming show comes to the New Theatre Cardiff to make a splash in August 2027!  Journey back to the glamour of Hollywood in the roaring 20’s with high-energy choreography and sumptuous set designs (including over 14,000 litres of water on stage), combined with all the romance and wit of one of the world’s best- loved films.  Beautiful, charismatic, and very much in love (if you believe what you read in the press), Hollywood’s golden couple, Don Lockwood and Lina Lamont have the world at their feet. But when “talkies” start to replace silent movies, and an aspiring actress is drafted in to save the day, life as they know it is turned upside down.  Singin’ in the Rain features the glorious MGM score including Good Morning, Make ‘em Laugh and the legendary Singin’ in the Rain.  Don’t save it for a rainy day, book your tickets now!

title: My Royal Life: An Audience With Lucy Worsley
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Step into a glittering royal world with Lucy Worsley, beloved historian and bestselling author, who spent twenty years working as Chief Curator in some of Britain’s most marvellous palaces.  Lucy wants to take you behind the scenes and into the history of the royal residences she came to know so well, from Hampton Court’s Haunted Gallery, to the gilded apartments of Kensington Palace. Along the way, we’ll meet some of Britain’s best-known queens and kings, and find out what Lucy really thinks of them. With her trademark warmth and scholarly sparkle, this evening will lift the lid on royal life over the centuries, introducing you to its pageantry and – sometimes – its pain. Prepare to be entertained, enlightened, and thoroughly charmed as Lucy reveals the secrets, stories, and splendours of Britain’s royal past.

title: Curated by Sammy Virji
description: UK Garage’s biggest breakout star Sammy Virji lands in Cardiff for a huge open-air headline show at Shangri-La in the Castle, joined by a stacked line-up of special guests including Salute, Silva Bumpa, Arthi B2B Saint Ludo, Yemz and Lucas Alexander. One of the most in-demand names in dance music right now, Virji is at the forefront of the UKG resurgence. From viral DJ Mag sets to packed-out festival crowds worldwide, his rise has been rapid. Known for feel-good energy, heavy basslines and razor-sharp selections, his sets are built for full-scale party moments. Joining the bill is Vienna-born producer Salute, alongside fast-rising UK talent Silva Bumpa, while Arthi B2B Saint Ludo, Yemz and Lucas Alexander round out a huge line-up of club innovators and emerging names. In recent years, Virji has gone B2B with Four Tet, delivered a standout BBC Radio 1 Essential Mix and picked up DJ Mag Best Producer at the 2025 Best of British Awards. His tracks — including If U Need It and Cops & Robbers with Skepta — have racked up tens of millions of streams worldwide. TICKETS ➡️ On sale from Tuesday 10 March, 10AM
shortDescription: Sammy Virji headlines with Salute, Silva Bumpa, Arthi B2B Saint Ludo, Yemz and Lucas Alexander for a huge edition of Shangri-La in the Castle
subcategory: Curated by Sammy Virji

title: David Byrne
description: David Byrne brings his Who Is The Sky? World Tour to Cardiff Castle this summer, following a huge sold-out arena show in the city. One of the most influential and inventive artists of his generation, Byrne’s career spans decades — from co-founding Talking Heads to an acclaimed solo catalogue and groundbreaking work across music, theatre, film and visual art. His live shows are renowned for their creativity, energy and emotional impact. The Who Is The Sky? tour builds on the spirit of American Utopia, blending bold visuals, cinematic arrangements and infectious rhythm with songs drawn from across Byrne’s career — including Talking Heads classics, solo favourites and material from his latest album Who Is The Sky?. Joining David Byrne as special guest support is Anna Calvi. A three-time Mercury Prize nominee and BRIT Award nominee, Calvi is celebrated for her powerful, uncompromising sound and electrifying live performances. Her latest album Hunter is a fearless and visceral release, and she recently composed the score for the final two seasons of Peaky Blinders. Set against the dramatic backdrop of Cardiff Castle, this open-air summer show promises an unforgettable night — bringing together two truly distinctive artists on one iconic stage. 🎟 Tickets Presale opens Thursday 5 February, 10AM General sale from Friday 6 February, 10AM
shortDescription: David Byrne brings his Who Is The Sky? World Tour to Cardiff Castle, July 25th with special guest Anna Calvi.
subcategory: SOLD OUT: David Byrne

title: David Gray – Past & Present Tour
description: With special guest The Divine Comedy Following a run of 68 sold-out shows across the USA, Australia, UK and Ireland in 2025, multi-platinum artist David Gray has announced a brand-new summer date in Cardiff as part of his Past & Present World Tour. On Saturday 11th July 2026, Cardiff Castle will host the closing show of Gray’s UK & Ireland run – a night set to be nothing short of spectacular. Joining him will be very special guest The Divine Comedy, bringing an extra layer of magic to this one-off evening. The tour has already taken in legendary venues such as London’s Royal Albert Hall, Glasgow’s SEC Armadillo, Manchester’s O2 Apollo and Dublin’s 3Arena, as well as a celebrated headline slot at Electric Picnic. His latest album Dear Life has been praised as some of his most powerful and emotive work since White Ladder, showcasing Gray’s enduring artistry as one of the UK’s most influential singer-songwriters. Don’t miss your chance to experience an unforgettable night of music in the iconic surroundings of Cardiff Castle.
shortDescription: David Gray brings his Past & Present Tour to Cardiff Castle, Sat 11 July 2026, with special guest The Divine Comedy.
subcategory: David Gray – Past & Present Tour

title: Richard Ashcroft
description: Richard Ashcroft heads to Cardiff Castle next summer for a huge outdoor headline show on Thursday 16 July. Fresh off a standout year supporting Oasis across their 2025 stadium dates and the success of his seventh solo album Lovin You — which landed at Number Three in the UK charts — he returns in peak form. A two-time Ivor Novello and triple BRIT Award winner, Ashcroft remains one of the UK’s most influential songwriters. His set will draw from a catalogue that spans generational anthems with The Verve through to his expansive solo work. He’s joined by a heavyweight support bill: original Kasabian frontman Tom Meighan, bringing his trademark vocals and material from his solo album The Reckoning, plus rising indie favourites Apollo Junction opening the night. This show joins a stacked summer of music at TK Maxx presents DEPOT Live at Cardiff Castle — one of 2026’s major highlights.
shortDescription: Richard Ashcroft headlines Cardiff Castle on 16 July 2026 with special guests Tom Meighan and Apollo Junction.
subcategory: Richard Ashcroft

title: Bingo Lingo at Tiger Yard
description: After a complete sell out series last summer, get ready for a night like no other! BINGO LINGO takes over Tiger Yard with a wild party like no other. — huge anthems, outrageous on-stage battles, epic prizes, and hilarious hosts bringing pure chaos from start to finish. Open-air vibes when the sun’s out, and if the weather turns rubbish, the roof goes on and the party doesn’t stop. Whether you’re a bingo newbie or a seasoned pro, expect the unexpected: 💃 Wild rounds. 🚨 The legendary rave round. 🎤 Crowd interaction. 🎁 Prizes so good they’ll change your life… 🕺 Stage antics that’ll have you laughing all night. 🌞 Glorious sunshine every night… maybe. 🎟️ TICKETS & TABLES Everyone needs an entry ticket Doors: 18:00 Last entry: 19:30 Reserved tables available (book ahead!) – Tables hold 8 Unreserved tables are held for ticket holders on a first-come basis Hen, and Stag packages available 📍LOCATION Tiger Yard, Porth Teigr Way, Cardiff Bay, CF10 4GA 🔥 WHAT IS BINGO LINGO? Imagine bingo, but completely reimagined — with huge music anthems, crazy prizes, wild games, and nonstop laughs from start to finish. This isn’t a quiet night with a dabber — it’s your new favourite party. Whether you’re coming with mates, on a big night out, or just up for something different, BINGO LINGO is packed with high-energy hosts, ridiculous on-stage antics, and unforgettable moments. You don’t need to know the rules — just bring your crew, grab a drink, and get ready to shout for bingo, sing along, and maybe even win something bizarre. Full terms & conditions: www.bingolingo.club
shortDescription: Bingo Lingo at Tiger Yard delivers huge anthems, chaotic games and epic prizes. Open air in the sun, roof closed if the weather turns.
subcategory: Bingo Lingo at Tiger Yard

title: Self Esteem
description: Self Esteem returns to Cardiff next summer for a major outdoor headline show at Cardiff Castle – her biggest Welsh date to date. The Ivor Novello Award-winning singer, songwriter and actor brings the next chapter of A Complicated Woman to the Welsh capital, joined by special guest Kae Tempest and opening support Joshua Idehen. Fresh off the release of her acclaimed third album and debut book, Self Esteem (Rebecca Lucy Taylor) enters 2026 at full throttle. From the anthemic Focus Is Power – soundtrack to the Lionesses’ Euros victory coverage – to her run as Sally Bowles in Cabaret, Taylor has become one of the UK’s most fearless and celebrated creative voices. Since breaking through with Prioritise Pleasure, she’s earned Mercury, BRIT and NME nominations, racked up cross-station BBC playlisting, and cemented herself as one of the most compelling performers in modern pop. Joining her in Cardiff is Kae Tempest – the revered poet, playwright and recording artist whose career spans award-winning theatre, Mercury-nominated albums and internationally acclaimed written works. Opening the night is Joshua Idehen, the British-Nigerian poet and artist whose viral track Mum Does The Washing sparked a new wave of attention for his powerful spoken word and genre-blurring live performances. Presented by DEPOT Live, Cuffe & Taylor and Clwb Ifor Bach.
shortDescription: Self Esteem brings a headline show with special guest Kae Tempest, and Joshua Idehen to Cardiff Castle on Friday 24th July 2026
subcategory: Self Esteem

title: Depot In The Castle 2026: The Wombats, Sugababes +More
description: Depot in the Castle returns to the iconic grounds of Cardiff Castle on Saturday 25 July 2026 for a huge all-day celebration of live music, street food and entertainment – with The Wombats confirmed as headliners and Sugababes announced as special guests. One of Wales’ best-loved family-friendly festivals, Depot in the Castle brings together major headline acts, rising talent and a buzzing summer festival atmosphere right in the heart of the city. Fresh from the release of their sixth studio album Oh! The Ocean, The Wombats remain one of the UK’s most enduring indie bands, known for era-defining anthems including Let’s Dance to Joy Division, Greek Tragedy and Moving to New York. Expect a huge sing-along set to close out the day. Joining them are pop icons Sugababes, bringing their unmistakable vocals and a catalogue packed with hits such as Overload, Round Round, Freak Like Me and Push The Button. Following their biggest UK arena tour to date, they arrive in Cardiff at the peak of their powers. The full line-up also features: Red Rum Club – delivering their trademark mariachi-tinged indie rock Ben Ellis – a fast-rising Cardiff talent Afro Cluster – bringing high-energy Afrobeat and funk The Family Battenberg – known for their energetic live shows Alongside the music, expect local street food traders, family-friendly activities and a vibrant festival atmosphere throughout the day. Following last year’s sold-out edition headlined by Jess Glynne, Depot in the Castle 2026 is shaping up to be one of the standout events of the summer.
shortDescription: Join The Wombats, Sugababes and more at Depot in the Castle 2026 – Cardiff’s ultimate one-day festival at Cardiff Castle.
subcategory: Depot In The Castle 2026: The Wombats, Sugababes +More

title: The Flaming Lips
description: One of the most inventive and influential live bands of the last three decades, The Flaming Lips return to Cardiff for a very special An Evening With performance at DEPOT. Renowned for their genre-defying sound, surreal visuals and euphoric live shows, the band will perform two unique sets on the night. Offering fans a deeper, more expansive journey through their celebrated catalogue. Expect moments of psychedelic beauty, towering anthems and the unmistakable sense of spectacle that has made their live shows legendary worldwide. From era-defining albums to left-field experiments and fan-favourite singalongs, this will be an immersive, one-off experience from a band that continues to push the boundaries of what a live show can be. 🎟️ TICKETS Presale – Wednesday, 11 Feb 10AM General sale – Friday, 13 Feb 10AM
shortDescription: The Flaming Lips return to Cardiff for An Evening With at DEPOT, performing two unique live sets on 29 July.
subcategory: The Flaming Lips

title: Biffy Clyro
description: Scottish rock icons Biffy Clyro return to Wales this summer to headline a huge outdoor show at Cardiff Castle as part of TK Maxx presents DEPOT Live at Cardiff Castle. Following their hugely successful Cardiff date on The Futique Tour, the trio return by popular demand for one of the standout live shows of the summer. Renowned for their explosive performances and emotionally charged anthems, Biffy Clyro have built a reputation as one of the UK’s most powerful and reliable live bands. Expect a career-spanning set packed with era-defining favourites alongside material from their celebrated catalogue, delivered with the intensity and precision that has seen them headline the world’s biggest festivals and arenas. Support comes from Mercury Prize-winning indie rockers English Teacher, whose debut album This Could Be Texas has been widely hailed as one of the strongest debuts in recent years. Opening the show are rising Glaswegian punk outfit Humour, rapidly gaining attention across the UK, Europe and the US. This is set to be a huge night in the heart of the city — and one not to miss. 🎟 Tickets Presale opens Thursday 12 February, 10AM General sale from Friday 13 February, 10AM
shortDescription: Scottish rock icons Biffy Clyro headline Cardiff Castle this summer with special guests English Teacher and Humour
subcategory: Biffy Clyro

title: The Streets
description: Mike Skinner and The Streets return to Cardiff for a huge summer show at Cardiff Castle, bringing their iconic album A Grand Don’t Come For Free to life — performed in full, from start to finish, for the very first time. Originally released in 2004, A Grand Don’t Come For Free became one of the most defining British albums of the 2000s. Built around a cinematic storyline that unfolds track by track, the record blends sharp storytelling, humour and raw honesty across classics including Dry Your Eyes, Blinded by the Lights, Fit But You Know It and Could Well Be In. Over two decades later, fans will finally get to experience the full narrative live on stage. Joining the bill as special guest is CASISDEAD, the elusive UK rapper known for his cinematic lyricism and dark, synth-driven sound. Widely regarded as one of the most inventive voices in UK rap, his atmospheric live performances have earned him a devoted following. Also on the bill is Jimothy Lacoste, the cult favourite artist whose self-produced tracks and offbeat storytelling have built an international fanbase. With his DIY approach and witty take on everyday life, he brings a unique energy to the lineup. Opening the night are Local and Lucas Alexander — two of the most exciting artists Wales has produced. Local has built one of the most loyal audiences in UK underground rap, while Lucas Alexander is rapidly establishing himself as one of the country’s most talked-about electronic talents. Homegrown artists on the biggest stage in the city. Set within the historic walls of Cardiff Castle, this one-off performance promises a rare chance to experience one of the UK’s most influential albums exactly as it was intended — live, in full, and in an unforgettable setting.
shortDescription: The Streets perform A Grand Don't Come For Free in full at Cardiff Castle with Casisdead, Jimothy Lacoste, Local and Lucas Alexander.
subcategory: The Streets

title: Sex Pistols feat. Frank Carter
description: Punk history lands in the heart of Cardiff as Sex Pistols featuring Frank Carter headline Cardiff Castle on Saturday 1 August 2026, marking 50 years of punk. Steve Jones, Paul Cook and Glen Matlock are joined by Frank Carter for a full-throttle celebration of one of the most influential bands of all time. Fresh off a huge year of global shows and a fiery revival that’s seen circle pits at the Royal Albert Hall and a packed-out return to London’s 100 Club, the Pistols are hitting Cardiff for a massive outdoor show. They’re joined by a heavyweight punk lineup: The Stranglers, The Undertones, and Cardiff’s own rising force Panic Shack opening the night. Expect a relentless, high-energy bill honouring the legacy, attitude and chaos that kicked off a movement in 1976 — brought to life by a band that helped define it. This is a milestone moment for the castle’s summer series and one of the standout shows of 2026.
shortDescription: A huge night of punk at Cardiff Castle as Sex Pistols featuring Frank Carter are joined by The Stranglers, The Undertones and Panic Shack.
subcategory: Sex Pistols feat. Frank Carter

title: Two Door Cinema Club
description: Indie icons Two Door Cinema Club are celebrating the 15th anniversary of their debut album Tourist History with a huge outdoor show at Cardiff Castle, as part of TK Maxx presents DEPOT Live 2026. The Northern Irish trio – Alex Trimble, Sam Halliday and Kevin Baird – will perform Tourist History in full, alongside fan favourites from across their career. Expect a night of high-energy anthems and pure indie nostalgia, featuring hits like What You Know, Something Good Can Work and Undercover Martyn. Joining them for this special anniversary show are Friendly Fires, whose Mercury-nominated debut album became a defining soundtrack of the late 2000s, and exciting new act 3LIJAH, opening the evening with their gritty, genre-blurring sound. From their breakout in 2010 to headlining major festivals around the world, Tourist History remains a landmark record that continues to resonate – with What You Know recently surpassing 1 billion streams on Spotify. Don’t miss one of the biggest live shows of summer 2026 as Two Door Cinema Club bring their electric live energy to the heart of Cardiff. 🎟️ Tickets Presale: 10am Thursday 30 October General sale: 10am Friday 31 October
shortDescription: Two Door Cinema Club celebrate 15 years of Tourist History with a massive outdoor show at Cardiff Castle with Friendly Fires and 3LIJAH.

title: Hollywood Vampires
description: American rock supergroup Hollywood Vampires return to the UK for their first live shows in almost three years — and they’re bringing one of the loudest nights of the summer to Cardiff Castle. Featuring Alice Cooper, Johnny Depp, Joe Perry and Tommy Henriksen, Hollywood Vampires will headline a huge open-air show in one of the most iconic settings in the country. Known for their explosive live performances, the band deliver a no-holds-barred celebration of rock ’n’ roll, blending original material with blistering tributes to the legends who shaped the genre. Expect stone-cold classics and powerhouse performances inspired by the likes of The Who, Led Zeppelin, David Bowie, Motörhead, AC/DC and more, alongside tracks from the band’s own releases and iconic hits from Alice Cooper and Aerosmith. This is a full-throttle rock show built for big stages and summer nights. Special guests The Damned join the bill, bringing true punk and goth-rock royalty to the castle walls. Celebrating their 50th anniversary, the legendary band boast a career spanning 12 studio albums and some of the most influential records in British punk history, making this a rare and unmissable pairing. Hollywood Vampires at Cardiff Castle promises a loud, electric and unforgettable night of rock history in the making. ➡ Presale – Thursday 22 January at 10AM ➡ General Sale – Friday 23 January at 10AM
shortDescription: Hollywood Vampires headline Cardiff with special guests The Damned. A huge open-air show featuring Alice Cooper, Johnny Depp and Joe Perry.

title: Jimmy Eat World
description: Jimmy Eat World return to the UK in 2026 for a run of exclusive outdoor shows celebrating 25 years of their landmark album Bleed American — with a huge one-night takeover at TK Maxx presents DEPOT Live at Cardiff Castle. The Arizona alt-rock icons will perform the album in full for the first time in the UK, alongside rarities and fan favourites from across their catalogue. Expect a bigger production than ever as the band mark a record that helped define a generation. They’re joined by a stacked line-up: Chicago punk heavyweights Rise Against as special guests, with The Get Up Kids and Jay Som completing the bill. Bleed American remains a pivotal release — certified Platinum in the US, Gold in the UK, and home to era-defining tracks like The Middle, which has surpassed a billion streams. Its influence runs deep, shaping a wave of modern rock and alternative artists. This Cardiff Castle date sits within a blockbuster summer of shows for DEPOT Live, joining a packed 2026 programme of major artists and large-scale outdoor events. A milestone album. A rare full-album performance. A standout night in the castle.
shortDescription: Jimmy Eat World bring their Bleed American 25th anniversary show to Cardiff Castle with Rise Against, The Get Up Kids and Jay Som.
subcategory: SOLD OUT: Jimmy Eat World

description: Cardiff After our sellout April show we are back by huge demand in August! Cardiff get ready for a massive 90s & 00s R&B Festival at the amazing DEPOT! Cardiff crew are ready for another massive 90s & 00s R&B Festival! Expect the craziest vibes at this one! We have an insane event planned with lots of glitter, glam & confetti and we have one of the best venues in the city! 💃 MUSIC 💃 Music from: DESTINY’S CHILD / ASHANTI / JA RULE / USHER / LUDACRIS / MS LAURYN HILL / TLC / CIARA / NELLY / NE-Y0 / TREY SONGZ / GINUWINE / BRANDY / MONICA / EVE / SEAN PAUL / MISSY ELLIOT / FAT JOE / CASSIE / TWISTA / MASE / MYA / NEXT / 112 / MARIO / DONNELL JONES / AMERIE / KELIS / MARIAH CAREY / YING YANG TWINS / PRETTY RICKY / JOE / DRU HILL / JODECI / TWEET / LLOYD / JON B / KEVIN LYTTLE EXPECT 👇 – 6 hours of Old School 90s & 00’s RnB Anthems – Live Performers & Hosts – Venue Decor – Festival Production – Confetti Showers – Glitter Stations – Massive Giveaways – State of the art sound system ⚠️ This event will sell out! ⚠️

title: The Living Tombstone
description: Dubbed “the internet’s biggest gaming band”, The Living Tombstone bring their Multiplayer Tour to DEPOT for one huge summer show. With over 9 million YouTube subscribers and more than 70 billion streams worldwide, the duo of Yoav Landau and Sam Haft have built a global fanbase that spans music, gaming and pop culture. From viral anthems like Five Nights at Freddy’s to their latest album Rust, TLT deliver a high-energy live show packed with cinematic visuals, heavy drops and fan-favourite tracks. Fresh from a sold-out world tour, expect a night of electronic rock, immersive storytelling and a crowd that knows every word. 🎟️ On sale: Friday 6th March at 10am.

title: Craig Charles Funk & Soul House Party
description: Craig Charles brings his legendary Funk & Soul House Party to DEPOT for a full-throttle night of grooves, rare cuts and dancefloor-filling anthems. A selector in the truest sense, Craig Charles has spent over three decades digging deep into funk, soul, disco and rare groove — delivering feel-good, high-energy sets that keep rooms moving from start to finish. Known to millions from BBC 6 Music and revered on festival stages from Glastonbury to club basements across the UK, this is a master at work behind the decks. Expect timeless funk, raw soul, northern classics and infectious rhythms, all delivered with Craig’s trademark style and unstoppable energy. Joining him on the night: Deptford Northern Soul Club Big Macs Wholly Soul Band 🎟️ TICKETS → Priority Tickets: 12th Feb, 10am → Any remaining Tickets: 13th Feb 10am
shortDescription: Funk, soul and rare groove legend Craig Charles brings his Funk & Soul Club to DEPOT for a night of timeless grooves and dancefloor classics.
subcategory: Craig Charles Funk & Soul House Party

title: Beefy’s Big Weekender: Sara Pascoe
description: Beefy’s Comedy Club welcomes one of the UK’s most beloved comedians to Depot for a night of brilliant stand-up. Fresh from her biggest ever tour — I Am a Strange Gloop — which took her across the UK, Australia and Canada, Sara Pascoe brings her sharp, celebrated comedy to Cardiff. A Sunday Times bestselling author and TV favourite known from Taskmaster, Live at the Apollo, QI and 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown, Sara is a true multi-hyphenate talent at the very top of her game. Hosted by Carl Morgan, with support acts on the bill, this is a fantastic night of comedy not to be missed.

title: The History of Jungle
description: The History of Jungle brings its UK tour to Depot this September, with a lineup drawn from the defining era of UK jungle. Ten DJs. Eight MCs. One sound system built to carry the music properly. Cardiff has its own deep relationship with this music. From early sound system culture in Butetown through to the rise of jungle and drum and bass, the city built its scene through community, independent spaces and a DIY spirit that sits at the very heart of what jungle is. This is a natural home for an event like this. DJs (A–Z) Aphrodite · Aries · Brockie · Congo Natty · Dillinja · DJ Hype · DJ Rap · Grooverider · Kenny Ken · Micky Finn MCs (A–Z) Det · Eksman · Five Alive · Harry Shotta · IC3 · Navigator · Ragga Twins · Shabba Support from Wales Junglists Bongo · Jackal & Hyde · Lion UK · Missy G · T-Bone The London edition sold out months in advance. Cardiff will be no different. 🎟️ TICKETS Tickets go on sale Friday 1 May at 09:00.
shortDescription: The History of Jungle comes to Depot Cardiff. Grooverider, Dillinja, DJ Hype, Congo Natty & more. 10 DJs, 8 MCs. 19 September 2026.
subcategory: The History of Jungle

title: Charlotte Church’s End Times Pop Dungeon
description: For over a decade, Charlotte Church’s Late Night Pop Dungeon has been one of the most fiercely original live experiences in Britain. Part euphoric rave, part sacred ceremony, part total Dadaist carnage, it has become the stuff of festival legend. Now it returns, reborn and recharged, for one final chapter. End Times Pop Dungeon: The Evolution Will Not Be Televised. This is the Pop Dungeon at its most apocalyptic. Riffs that could level a city. Voices that belong somewhere celestial. And Charlotte Fucking Church leading the whole beautiful chaos from the front. Their collage-as-concert has always moved people somewhere else entirely, and this tour is no different. It is a transportation. It is a transformation. And it’s coming to Depot. ➡️ Pre-Sale: 10am, Thursday, 18th June ➡️ General Sale: 10am, Friday 19th June
shortDescription: Charlotte Church's End Times Pop Dungeon returns for one final chapter of euphoric, apocalyptic live music chaos.
subcategory: Charlotte Church’s End Times Pop Dungeon

title: Autechre – Live
description: Following a run of sold-out shows throughout 2025, Autechre return in 2026 with an expanded run of live dates. Sean Booth and Rob Brown will head from Japan in February into a major European stretch across September and October — including their biggest headline show to date in London — before landing in Cardiff this October. Autechre’s live shows are unlike anything else: full immersion, complete focus, and a performance delivered entirely in darkness. This is a rare chance to experience one of electronic music’s most influential and uncompromising acts in their purest form. 🎟️ Tickets ➡ Presale live Wednesday 3rd December, 11am ➡ General sale Thursday 4th December, 11am DISCLAIMER: Autechre will perform in total darkness. For their set all lights in the venue will be off and the bars will be closed if they are in the room where Autechre perform. Please plan on being in one place for the performance and do not move unnecessarily until it has finished when the lights will come back on again. Please do not shine any lights at the stage or around the room during the performance. If you need to leave for any reason please use your mobile phone to light your way. Absolutely no recording or flash photography please. If you are uncomfortable with the idea of spending around one hour in the dark while Autechre play please do not book a ticket for this concert. Thanks and enjoy the experience, Autechre
shortDescription: Autechre bring their live tour to DEPOT for a rare performance presented entirely in darkness, offering a unique immersive live experience.
subcategory: Autechre – Live

title: Shang Presents: Duke Dumont
description: Fifteen years ago, Duke Dumont played his first headline show for Shangri-La in Cardiff. Now he’s back — and this time he’s bringing everything with him. Since that first show, Dumont has built one of the most uncompromising careers in electronic music. UK #1 singles. A cult-favourite DJ series in For Club Play Only. A 2022 Coachella set that announced him as a genuine live force. And a debut album that proved there was far more to him than the dancefloor — though the dancefloor has always been where it matters most. His latest album Union is the clearest statement of intent yet. Designed to be heard in full, in a room, with a crowd — not shuffled on a playlist. Every track built for the live experience, including euphoric anthem The Chant, which has become a centrepiece of his acclaimed live show. That show — complete with custom visuals, stage design, and a production built to fill the biggest rooms — comes to Depot this October. ➡️ Priority Tickets: Wed 24th June, 10am ➡️ Any remaining Tickets: Fri 26th June, 10am SIGN UP FOR PRESALE
shortDescription: Duke Dumont brings his acclaimed live show to Cardiff. Custom visuals, immersive production and a set built for the dancefloor.
subcategory: Shang Presents: Duke Dumont
