title: Cardiff Gluten-Free Festival
description: Cardiff Gluten-Free Food Festival is a fully gluten-free food festival created for the coeliac and gluten-free community. Taking place at DEPOT, the event will bring together a curated selection of trusted gluten-free food vendors, bakeries, drinks brands and small businesses in a safe, exciting and community-focused environment. Alongside food traders, the festival will also feature live acoustic music, guest talks and family-friendly activities within the Little Foodies Zone.
shortDescription: Cardiff Gluten-Free Food Festival is a fully gluten-free food festival created for the coeliac and gluten-free community.
subcategory: SOLD OUT: Cardiff Gluten-Free Festival

title: PRESIDENT — Blood of Your Empire
description: Multi-million streaming UK collective PRESIDENT bring their headline campaign to Depot this November, in support of their debut full-length Blood of Your Empire, out September 4 via Atlantic Records. Built on mystery, intent, and a refusal to conform, PRESIDENT have carved out a space entirely their own — sitting at the crossroads of heavy music, electronic experimentation, and cinematic atmosphere. Since launching in 2025, they’ve cultivated a devoted following through a string of singles and live performances, letting the music do the talking. Blood of Your Empire is a bold and unflinching debut — a record born from frontman President’s own reckoning with existential crisis, faith, mortality, and the long, complicated shadow religion has cast across human history. It’s an album that lives in contradiction: the compassion and the bloodshed, the beauty and the ruin. Lead single DOOMLOOP sets the tone — a meditation on time, presence, and the cost of sleepwalking through your own life. The album artwork is taken from The Battle of Poitiers by Eugène Delacroix — a painting that hangs in the Louvre — a fittingly grand and visceral image for a record of this scope. Fresh from a sold-out US run supporting Bad Omens, PRESIDENT return home to headline. Don’t miss them at Depot on 18 November. 🎟️ General On-Sale: Friday 29th May, 10am
shortDescription: PRESIDENT bring their Blood of Your Empire UK Tour to Depot, Cardiff. Heavy music, cinematic atmosphere. Don't miss out!
subcategory: PRESIDENT — Blood of Your Empire

title: Avatar — Don’t Go In The Forest ’26
description: Swedish theatrical metal titans Avatar bring their Don’t Go In The Forest ’26 headline European tour to Depot Cardiff on Saturday 22nd November, with special guests Neckbreakker. Hot on the heels of a monumental summer — which includes a run of dates supporting Metallica across Europe (including London Stadium on 5th July) and headline slots at some of the continent’s biggest festivals — Avatar round out 2026 on their own terms, plunging Europe Out of the Shadows… Into the Dark. Avatar have spent two decades honing one of live music’s most visceral and unforgettable experiences: a collision of unrelenting heavy metal and theatrical spectacle that has made them a must-see act at every stage they’ve graced. Their latest album Don’t Go In The Forest is out now. Supporting on all dates are Danish death metal outfit Neckbreakker.
shortDescription: Swedish metal icons Avatar headline a European tour with special guests Neckbreaker. Out of the Shadows… Into the Dark
subcategory: Avatar — Don’t Go In The Forest ’26

title: Little Angels – Big Bad & Back Tour
description: Legendary UK hard rock band Little Angels are Big, Bad & Back — returning with an ultra-rare UK tour featuring the full original line-up. Formed nearly 40 years ago in Scarborough, Little Angels became one of the defining British rock bands of the late ’80s and early ’90s, building a fiercely loyal fanbase and scoring 11 UK Top 40 singles along the way. Their 1993 album Jam hit #1, cementing their place at the top of the UK rock scene. The last time the band toured was in 2012, following their triumphant return at Download Festival. Before that? A sold-out farewell show at London’s Royal Albert Hall in 1994. Now, for the first time in over a decade, Toby Jepson, Bruce Dickinson, Jim Dickinson, Mark Plunkett and Mark Richardson reunite for a proper return — not a nostalgia cash-in, but a celebration of an era, a scene, and a band that helped define it. Joining them as special guest on all dates is long-time friend and Thunder guitarist Luke Morley, making this a night firmly rooted in one of the most iconic periods of UK hard rock. 🎟️ TICKETS On sale 18 February at 9am
shortDescription: Little Angels bring their ultra-rare Big Bad & Back Tour to DEPOT in November. Full original line-up. Support from Luke Morley (Thunder)
subcategory: Little Angels – Big Bad & Back Tour

title: Fat Dog
description: Fat Dog make their long-awaited return to Cardiff — and this time they’re stepping it up. Armed with brand new music and a headline European tour, the London five-piece descend on Depot for their biggest Welsh show yet. Known for their feverish live shows and a sound that refuses to sit still, Fat Dog have been building relentlessly since their debut. November 24th promises to be something special. 🎟️ TICKETS Presale Thursday 14th May at 10am General sale Friday 15th May at 10am
shortDescription: Fat Dog return to Cardiff this November at for their Depot biggest Welsh show yet. Brand new music, brand new tour.
subcategory: Fat Dog

title: Midge Ure – A Man Of Two Worlds
description: Acclaimed musician, producer, and Ultravox frontman Midge Ure brings his visionary A Man Of Two Worlds Tour to DEPOT, Cardiff on 25 November 2026. This bold new live concept offers fans a rare and deeply personal concert experience. For the first time, Ure will blend his iconic hits and fan favourites with the atmospheric instrumentals that have long featured on his solo albums — many of which have never been performed live. The result is a rich show designed to take the audience on an emotional journey, both visually and sonically. From his early days with Slik and The Rich Kids, to defining the sound of the ’80s with Ultravox and co-creating the global charity single Do They Know It’s Christmas?, Midge Ure has always challenged musical expectations. With Ivor Novello, Grammy and BASCAP awards to his name, he continues to push boundaries with this ambitious new show. Don’t miss the chance to experience a truly unique evening of music that bridges decades of creativity — a live set not just performed, but curated, woven together into an unforgettable narrative. THIS IS A SEATED ONLY EVNET TICKETS ➡️ Presale – Weds 11th March, 9.30am ➡️ General sale – Fri 13th March, 9.30am
shortDescription: Midge Ure brings his A Man Of Two Worlds Tour to DEPOT, blending Ultravox classics with rarely performed instrumentals in a unique live show.
subcategory: Midge Ure – A Man Of Two Worlds

title: Bingo Lingo Christmas: The Greatest Show
description: Welcome to BINGO LINGO: The Greatest Show — a dazzling, high-energy spectacle where bingo meets the magic of the circus, and every moment feels larger than life. Hosted at our home, DEPOT, this isn’t just a bingo night…it’s a full-blown theatrical experience inspired by the iconic world of The Greatest Showman. Expect soaring anthems, jaw-dropping performances, and a venue transformed into a vibrant carnival of lights, colour, and pure excitement. From the moment the ringmaster takes the stage, you’ll be swept into a whirlwind of show-stopping music, immersive staging, and outrageous prizes — all wrapped up in the wild, unpredictable energy that only Bingo Lingo can deliver. Think big singalongs, unexpected twists, and unforgettable moments that will have you on your feet all night long. Whether you’re belting out the biggest hits, dancing between rounds, or chasing that winning line, this is your chance to be part of something spectacular. The stakes are high. The vibes are electric. The show must go on. Prepare to enter the greatest bingo show on Earth…  TICKETS & TABLES Everyone needs an entry ticket Doors: 18:00 First Game 20:00 Reserved tables available (book ahead!) – Tables hold 8, large tables 16 Unreserved tables are held for ticket holders on a first-come basis Hen, and Stag packages available  WHAT IS BINGO LINGO? Imagine bingo, but completely reimagined — with huge music anthems, crazy prizes, wild games, and nonstop laughs from start to finish. This isn’t a quiet night with a dabber — it’s your new favourite party. Whether you’re coming with mates, on a big night out, or just up for something different, BINGO LINGO is packed with high-energy hosts, ridiculous on-stage antics, and unforgettable moments. You don’t need to know the rules — just bring your crew, grab a drink, and get ready to shout for bingo, sing along, and maybe even win something bizarre. Full terms & conditions: www.bingolingo.club

title: Beefy’s Comedy Club: Guz Khan
description: Beefy’s Comedy Club brings one of the UK’s hottest stand-up comedians to Depot Cardiff for an afternoon of brilliant comedy. Best known for creating and starring in the BAFTA-nominated BBC Three hit Man Like Mobeen, Guz Khan is a true comedy powerhouse. A familiar face from Taskmaster and Live at the Apollo, he has firmly established himself as one of the most exciting and original voices on the British comedy scene today. Hosted by Carl Morgan, with support acts on the bill, this is one afternoon show you won’t want to miss.
shortDescription: Guz Khan live at Depot, Cardiff with Beefy's Comedy Club. Sunday 6th December, 4pm. Tickets £32.50. Book now.
subcategory: Beefy’s Comedy Club: Guz Khan

title: James B Partridge presents The Big Christmas Assembly
description: Join James B Partridge for The Big Christmas Assembly 2026 – the nostalgic, feel-good festive singalong that brings your childhood Christmases flooding back. Packed with more festive classics, throwback mashups, and laugh-out-loud stories than you can throw a glitter-glue halo at. What began as playful performances for his pupils has grown into a nationwide phenomenon – from TikTok fame to closing the field at Glastonbury Festival. With recent appearances on Virgin Radio, BBC Radio 2, The One Show and Songs of Praise, James has never been more in demand – and with the majority of his 2025 Christmas tour selling out well in advance, early booking is strongly advised. Whether you’re organising the work Christmas party, planning that festive night out with friends, or simply treating yourself to the perfect pre-Christmas warm-up – this is guaranteed to get you, and everyone around you, well and truly in the spirit. Mulled wine in hand, the whole room singing Calypso Carol like it’s the last day of term – the kind of communal magic that lingers all the way to Boxing Day. James says: “I’ve always loved how the songs we sang as children at Christmas brought so much joy. This show is a celebration of those moments – from assembly halls to nativity plays – and I can’t wait to see audiences relive them together.”
shortDescription: The nostalgic, feel-good festive singalong packed with more Christmas classics & throwback mashups than you can throw a glitter-glue halo.
subcategory: James B Partridge presents The Big Christmas Assembly

title: One Night In Nashville: A Very Country Christmas
description: Celebrate the festive season with a full-blown Nashville party as One Night In Nashville: A Very Country Christmas lands at DEPOT. Bringing the UK’s leading honky-tonk experience to the warehouse, this high-energy live show delivers the biggest modern country hits alongside timeless classics — all wrapped in a Christmas twist. Expect a packed set featuring music made famous by the likes of Shania Twain, Luke Combs, Carrie Underwood, Taylor Swift and Chris Stapleton, plus iconic tributes to legends including Dolly Parton, Johnny Cash and Kenny Rogers. Fronted by UK country star Maria Jordan and backed by a powerhouse live band, the show transports you straight to downtown Nashville with big vocals, standout musicianship and wall-to-wall singalongs. It’s not just a gig — it’s a full experience built for country fans and party crowds alike. Whether you’re in it for the classics, the modern hits or just a big festive night out, expect a feel-good atmosphere, hands-in-the-air moments and a proper Christmas party with a country edge. This is Nashville, DEPOT style. One night only. TICKETS ➡️ On sale Monday, 20 April at 10am SIGN UP FOR TICKETS
shortDescription: Celebrate the festive season with a full-blown Nashville party as One Night In Nashville: A Very Country Christmas lands at DEPOT.
subcategory: One Night In Nashville: A Very Country Christmas

title: Bingo Lingo Christmas: The Greatest Show
description: Welcome to BINGO LINGO: The Greatest Show — a dazzling, high-energy spectacle where bingo meets the magic of the circus, and every moment feels larger than life. Hosted at our home, DEPOT, this isn’t just a bingo night…it’s a full-blown theatrical experience inspired by the iconic world of The Greatest Showman. Expect soaring anthems, jaw-dropping performances, and a venue transformed into a vibrant carnival of lights, colour, and pure excitement. From the moment the ringmaster takes the stage, you’ll be swept into a whirlwind of show-stopping music, immersive staging, and outrageous prizes — all wrapped up in the wild, unpredictable energy that only Bingo Lingo can deliver. Think big singalongs, unexpected twists, and unforgettable moments that will have you on your feet all night long. Whether you’re belting out the biggest hits, dancing between rounds, or chasing that winning line, this is your chance to be part of something spectacular. The stakes are high. The vibes are electric. The show must go on. Prepare to enter the greatest bingo show on Earth…  TICKETS & TABLES Everyone needs an entry ticket Doors: 18:00 First Game 20:00 Reserved tables available (book ahead!) – Tables hold 8, large tables 16 Unreserved tables are held for ticket holders on a first-come basis Hen, and Stag packages available  WHAT IS BINGO LINGO? Imagine bingo, but completely reimagined — with huge music anthems, crazy prizes, wild games, and nonstop laughs from start to finish. This isn’t a quiet night with a dabber — it’s your new favourite party. Whether you’re coming with mates, on a big night out, or just up for something different, BINGO LINGO is packed with high-energy hosts, ridiculous on-stage antics, and unforgettable moments. You don’t need to know the rules — just bring your crew, grab a drink, and get ready to shout for bingo, sing along, and maybe even win something bizarre. Full terms & conditions: www.bingolingo.club
shortDescription: The Greatest Show — a dazzling, high-energy spectacle where bingo meets the magic of the circus, and every moment is larger than life.
subcategory: Bingo Lingo Christmas: The Greatest Show

title: Indiepalooza Festival 2027
description: Indie Tribute Festival – Killers v Fender v Monkeys v Oasis v Kasabian v Kaiser Indiepalooza is an amazing touring indie-rock tribute festival featuring leading tributes to the Killers, Arctic Monkeys, Oasis, Sam Fender, Kasabian and Kaiser Cheats all on night. This has sold out 1000 cap+ venues all over the country and in it’s 3rd year. The Kopycat Killers, Oasis 96, Scam Fender, Sub-Arctic Monkeys, Kasabiaint and Kaiser Cheats are some of the best tributes in the world, playing huge festivals both in the UK and abroad to thousands and thousands, now all coming together on this special touring festival show. “This. Is. Great. He is selling out all over the UK!” – Chris Moyles, Radio X “This is Great. He does sound great to be fair!” – Greg James, Radio 1 6 HOURS OF WALL TO WALL BANGERS ALL NIGHT!!! – Expect Mr Brightside, Don’t Look Back In Anger, Seventeen Going Under, I Bet That You Look Good On The Dancefloor, Hypersonic Missiles, Somebody Told Me, Wonderwall, Mardy Bum, Human, When You Were Young, Will We Talk?, Do I Wanna Know, Supersonic, All These Things That I’ve Done, She’s Electric, Why’d You Only Call Me When You’re High, Cigarettes and Alcohol, Read My Mind, Florescent Adolescent, Glamorous Indie Rock N Roll, R U Mine?, Smile Like You Mean It, Spit Of You, 505, Getting Started, Snap Out Of It, Some Might Say, People Watching and many more! “Best tribute band I’ve ever seen, and I’ve photographed hundreds” D.Cowley “Scam Fender sound great to be fair, this is great” – Greg James Radio One – 7.2.22 “I’ve booked tribute in LA for years, this is the best of the best” – Steve Ochs “I’ve seen Killers 50 times in 9 countries, I was blown away by this tribute” – V.Moran LINE UP: THE KOPYCAT KILLERS SCAM FENDER SUBARCTIC MONKEYS OASIS 96 KASABIAINT KAISER CHEATS SHOW INFO: 14+ show (14-16s must be accompanied)
shortDescription: Indiepalooza is an amazing touring indie-rock tribute festival. Expect 6 hours of bangers from some of the best tributes in the world.
subcategory: Indiepalooza Festival 2027

title: 10CC’S - GRAHAM GOULDMAN & HEART FULL OF SONGS
description: 10cc founding member Graham Gouldman has announced an 18-date UK tour in 2026 for his highly acclaimed semi-acoustic band Heart Full of Songs. Featuring material from across Gouldman’s catalogue, the set includes 10cc classics I’m Not In Love and Dreadlock Holiday, alongside hits such as Bus Stop and Look Through Any Window (The Hollies), For Your Love and Heart Full of Soul (The Yardbirds), No Milk Today (Herman’s Hermits), Bridge To Your Heart (from his time in Wax with the late Andrew Gold), film soundtracks and songs from his solo albums.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Graham Gouldman.

title: THIS FLIGHT TONIGHT - THE SONGS OF JONI MITCHELL
description: An intimate acoustic tribute to the music of JONI MITCHELL, With a full and comprehensive performance of Joni's most beloved album 'Blue' in its entirety. 'Blue' is regarded by audiences and critics as one of the greatest albums of all time. Mitchell's honesty, musical prowess and iconic voice invites the audience into Joni's experience of living and loving through the complex era of social change of the early 1970s. 'Blue' highlights the fallout of a decade of hedonism... 'A Case of You', a stunning declaration of intoxicating love. 'Little Green' Arguably one of Joni's most personal and brave songs. 'California', 'Carey', carefree love letters to Joni's travels and freedom.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for This Flight Tonight - The songs of Joni Mitchell.

title: FANNA-FI-ALLAH SUFI QAWWALI
description: Now in their 26th year of international touring, Fanna-Fi-Allah remains one of the foremost traditional Qawwali ensembles in the world today. With thousands of performances across 50+ countries, they carry the living spirit of Sufi shrine music to global audiences, offering a rare and powerful immersion into this devotional art form. Led by Tahir Qawwal and supported by a masterful ensemble of tabla, harmonium, and choral vocals, the group stays rooted in the classical Qawwali tradition—without fusion, electronics, or pop crossover.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Fanna-Fi-Allah Sufi Qawwali.

title: GRAHAM PARKER
description: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic albums Howlin' Wind and Heat Treatment. Slinging his signature guitar and singing with inimitable soulful grit, Graham Parker has spent more than four decades carving out a singular place in rock and roll. A critics’ favorite and a songwriter’s songwriter, he emerged in the mid-1970s at a pivotal moment in British music. With his band The Rumour, Parker released a run of essential albums including Howlin’ Wind, Heat Treatment, and the undisputed classic Squeezing Out Sparks, records that fused literate songwriting with the raw energy that helped reshape rock in the late seventies.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Graham Parker.

title: JAMIE DUFFY - FLÂNEUR
description: Jamie Duffy: A Rising Star in the Music World "Whether he decides to be Ireland’s answer to Hans Zimmer or the next Yo-Yo Ma, the future is most certainly bright." - The Irish Times 22-year-old musician and songwriter Jamie Duffy is a notable force in the music scene, known for seamlessly blending traditional, popular, and classical influences into a distinctive musical style that captivates with its beauty. Jamie's debut track, "Solas," continues to break records, becoming the most streamed debut song by an Irish artist since Hozier's "Take Me To Church," amassing over 155 million streams on Spotify. With over 1.9 million monthly listeners, Jamie is solidifying his place in the music world.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Jamie Duffy - Flâneur.

title: TOBY LEE
description: Toby Lee announces his 3rd UK headline tour with his brilliant band. They’ll be heading out for 18 shows in October & November this year. Still only 21, Toby’s already a three-time winner of Young Blues Artist of the Year but the virtuoso guitarist, singer, songwriter is only just getting started. He’s currently recording his first major label album for Fontana/Universal with producers Bad Sounds. “Out of this world… you’re going to love him.” - Jools Holland
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Toby Lee.

title: GRACE PETRIE
description: For a decade and a half, Grace Petrie has been one of the UK’s most urgent and passionate songwriters. Coming of age amidst the coalition government, her politically charged folk music quickly gained national attention and propelled her to the main stages of folk festivals from Cambridge to Vancouver to the Blue Mountains of Australia. Characterised by razor-sharp lyricism and the unmistakable passion of her stage presence, her live shows have become synonymous for fans with a unique atmosphere of hope and solidarity, while the LGBTQ anthem Black Tie has racked up 1.5 million streams and provided the soundtrack of expression for young queer folks all over the world.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Grace Petrie.

title: TENILLE TOWNES
description: Known for songs that illuminate the inner lives of others, singer-songwriter Tenille Townes Townes now enters a new chapter with The Acrobat, her forthcoming album due April 10, 2026. Written during a period of personal and professional transition, the record marks her most stripped-back and introspective work to date. Originally conceived as simple work tapes, the songs were written and recorded in solitude, capturing raw moments of uncertainty, resilience, and self-reclamation. Tenille Townes is a Canada-born, Nashville-based artist whose music centers on empathy, honesty, and emotional clarity. Over the past five years, her deeply human storytelling has earned her two JUNO Awards, two Academy of Country Music Awards, and 17 Canadian Country Music Association Awards, alongside tours with artists like Stevie Nicks, Miranda Lambert, Shania Twain, Keith Urban, Reba, and George Strait. With The Acrobat, Townes embraces imperfection and autonomy, offering songs that hold space for change, boundaries, and the courage it takes to choose yourself.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Tenille Townes .

title: THE COURETTES
description: The Courettes is an explosive Wall of Sound group from Denmark and Brazil! Flavia Couri on vocals and guitar, Martin on loud drums and together they are the perfect blend of Wall of Sound, Girl Group Heartbreaks, Motown and R&B. Imagine The Ronettes meeting The Ramones at a wild party at the Hitsville echo chamber! The new album “The Soul Of The Fabulous Courettes” is out on legendary Damaged Goods Records, London and Rough Trade, London.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for The Courettes.

title: DEVIN TOWNSEND
description: Forging a career over four decades in countless genres, Devin Townsend has reached cult status in the progressive-metal world for his polymathic talent and continual pushing of the envelope. In 2025, after a career including iconic performances at Royal Albert Hall and multiple world tours, Townsend announced an indefinite hiatus from touring. Having then delivered the live debut in Groningen of ‘The Moth’, his most ambitious work to date, it was only natural to need a break. Townsend returned home to complete the studio album of ‘The Moth’ (out 29th May on InsideOut Music) and to rebuild himself in preparation for the next stage.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Devin Townsend.

title: SEVEN WONDERS - THE SPIRIT OF FLEETWOOD MAC
description: Seven Wonders are a 7-piece, 100% live band, who have come together to pay tribute to the legacy of Fleetwood Mac. The band cover all eras of the Fleetwood Mac collection; from the timeless Peter Green years, through to the 80’s classic Tango in the night. Seven Wonders capture the Spirit of Fleetwood Mac and they do it with passion and appreciation for this classic band. Be prepared to sing and dance the night away to classics including: Go your own way, Don’t stop, The Chain, Everywhere, Rhiannon, Dreams, Little lies, Oh well, Edge of seventeen and many more….. “I didn’t expect to feel like I was watching Fleetwood Mac….amazing vocals and band” “Absolutely fantastic band, The best tribute I’ve ever seen” “If you get a chance to see them ,100% you won’t be disappointed”
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Seven Wonders - The Spirit of Fleetwood Mac.

title: CARDIFF ARDWYN SINGERS PERFORM DUKE ELLINGTON’S SACRED CONCERT
description: Join the Cardiff Ardwyn Singers for a performance of Duke Ellington’s Sacred Concert - a striking mix of jazz, gospel and choral music. Featuring the Capital City Jazz Orchestra and soprano Claire Watkins, this concert brings together the energy of big band jazz with the power and scale of a full choir in one of Ellington’s most celebrated works. Also including works by Tippett, Chilcott, Hogan and Barry Rose.
support: Featuring the Capital City Jazz Orchestra and Soprano Claire Watkins
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Cardiff Ardwyn Singers perform Duke Ellington’s Sacred Concert.

title: CAITLIN MORAN: HOW TO BE HOPEFUL
description: Caitlin Moran is the eldest of eight children, home-educated on a council estate in Wolverhampton. She published her first novel at 16 and became a columnist at The Times at 18. She has won Columnist of the Year seven times and has also been named Interviewer and Critic of the Year. Her million-selling, groundbreaking feminist memoir, How to Be a Woman, was voted one of the Sunday Times’ ‘Most Important Books of the Twenty-First Century’. She lives in North London with her husband and two children, and, after following all her own advice, she really is hopeful now.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Caitlin Moran: How To Be Hopeful.

title: JOHN MOUSE
description: Following a run of high-profile support slots with Goldie Lookin Chain, Young Knives and Thousand Yard Stare, The Welsh John MOuse returns with a new phase of releases and a run of UK headline shows. Blending synth-driven new wave with sharp observational storytelling, The Welsh John MOuse has built a reputation for unpredictable, high-energy live performances — moving between humour, melancholy and something altogether more surreal.
support: With special guests Plastic Estate & Mining Museum
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for John MOuse .

title: NICK HEYWARD THE 12 DATES OF CHRISTMAS
description: Nick Heyward has announced a brand-new UK tour for winter 2026, The 12 Dates of Christmas — a unique run of intimate performances set in some of the country’s most beautiful and atmospheric venues. The 12-date UK tour will kick off on 14th November at Lincoln Cathedral and will see Heyward perform across historic churches and cathedrals, creating a special live experience that blends his much-loved catalogue with a festive, acoustic feel. Best known as the frontman of Haircut 100, Heyward continues to build on a remarkable legacy, with the band’s long-awaited follow-up to Pelican West – Boxing The Compass – set for release on 19 June 2026, marking an exciting new chapter for the band. Heyward is also currently working on new solo material, with more details on this exciting project to follow.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Nick Heyward.

title: WARD THOMAS
description: UK country-pop duo Ward Thomas have announced an intimate UK tour for the festive season. Taking place at the start of December the Christmas tour will take in 5 intimate venues in different corners of the country. Hailed as one the UK’s most successful country exports, twin sisters Catherine and Lizzy Ward Thomas will be performing a special acoustic set with a range of hits from their back catalogue as well as a select number of Christmas hits, reimagined with a cosy country flair. “We will be headed back out on a little Christmas tour in December! Very excited for this one! It’s so nice to do the intimate shows and add a few Christmas songs in too!”Catherine Thomas
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Ward Thomas.

title: NICKO MCBRAIN - AN EVENING IN CONVERSATION WITH
description: Following the recent announcement of Hello Boys and Girls!, Nicko McBrain’s thrilling, hilarious and deeply personal autobiography which will be published on 22nd October 2026, the much-loved drummer will now be taking to the road on a spoken word tour. Starting in Frankfurt on October 26th, Nicko McBrain will be visiting theatres across Germany, Netherlands, Scandinavia, Ireland and the UK, regaling audiences with colourful stories of a life well-lived. Featuring tales from behind the drum-stool of one of Britain’s biggest ever bands, alongside lessons learned from his eventful youth, his triumphant highs and deepest lows, this is a chance for fans to get up-close-and-personal with one of the most famous and admired men in rock history.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Nicko McBrain - An Evening In Conversation With.

title: RÍOGHNACH CONNOLLY & HONEYFEET
description: Ríoghnach Connolly & Honeyfeet move with ease and confidence between swampy jazz, raucous brass, fractured funk, blues balladry, and gorgeous folkloric textures. Connolly’s powerhouse vocals lead the charge, blending mischief, protest and vulnerability into something fiercely human and utterly live. Honeyfeet holds all of this together with a groove and a commitment to musical freedom. The lineup consists of Lorien Garth Edwards on bass, Ellis Davies on guitar, John Ellis on keyboards, Biff Roxby on brass, and Phill Howley on drums form a fluid and fearless musical unit.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Ríoghnach Connolly & Honeyfeet.

title: JOSIE LONG & ROBIN INCE: 20 YEARS OF SHAMBLES
description: For twenty years, Robin Ince and Josie Long have been performing and making things together. Now, after two decades of friendship, creativity and comedy, they are coming together for a special tour celebrating curiosity, collaboration and the joy of finding wonder in unexpected places. Expect a joyfully unpredictable evening of stand-up, poetry, conversation, (plenty of) digressions and whatever else emerges when two endlessly curious minds share a stage.
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Josie Long & Robin Ince: 20 Years Of Shambles.

title: FORGE’S GOT TALENT
description: Forge's Got Talent – the highlight of the evening! Watch Forge Drama’s most talented acts battle it out for amazing prizes in a thrilling live talent competition. Plus, enjoy a Performing Arts Showcase by the Forge Drama students of Cardiff West and a special preview of Aladdin Jr. by the Forge Drama students of Cardiff East.
support: Forge Drama’s Most Talented Acts Compete to Win Amazing Prizes!
shortDescription: Buy tickets and see event information for Forge’s Got Talent .

title: RITO DIGITAL + MOVEMENT81 / IMMERSIVE AV PERFORMANCE
description:
Rito Digital with support from Movement81
Experience an immersive electronic music journey from Chile to Swansea as Rito Digital and Movement81 transform the space into a living landscape of sound, generative visuals and collective energy.
Blurring the boundaries between performance and ritual, Rito Digital creates contemporary ceremonies where sound, light and digital environments converge to evoke connection, presence and inner exploration. Drawing from immersive design, XR technologies, and audiovisual art, each performance transforms space into a responsive ecosystem, inviting audiences to move beyond passive viewing into embodied participation.
Join us for an invitation to step into a shared digital ritual shaped by energy, interaction and collective flow.
Movement81 will set the tone with an immersive live AV performance blending uplifting electronics, minimal techno and evolving visuals.

 
Alma Digital Studio is a multidisciplinary new media art studio founded in Santiago, Chile by multimedia artist Vicente Manzano. They merge art, science, and spirituality to create immersive, interactive environments. By utilising bio-feedback tech and neurotechnology, they craft experiences that promote well-being and inner exploration Their work explores human perception and inner exploration through mediums like interactive VR installations, generative audiovisuals, and mixed-media experiences.
 

Movement81 is the electronic moniker of duo Jason&Becky, exploring the interconnected wormholes between 80s indie synth and 90s dance in a spaceship from the future, powered by the collective energy of today. Piloted by two Swansea-based Fine Artists and philosophical researchers, Jason&Becky, their flightpath often connects with the wider themes of their art practice, realised through immersive, interactive audio-visual (AV) installations. Their electronic music & live AV performances meander between uplifting dance & pensive minimal techno, blending resampled audio & visuals with new & original material.
 
17th July 2026
Doors open: 7pm
Movement 81: 7.30 to 8.30
Rito Digital: 9pm to 10.30pm
This is an 18+ event.
Tickets: £12.50 – £15
shortDescription: Immersive AV performance merging live electronic music, generative visuals, movement and storytelling into a collective and sensorial journey.

title: DINOSAURS, A STORY OF SURVIVAL / IMMERSIVE CINEMA
description:
Dinosaurs, a story of survival
A family-friendly animated film, exploring the fascinating journey of life’s evolution
Like almost all children, Celeste is fascinated with dinosaurs. She is preparing a talk for her class about how they went extinct when Moon, a very wise and magical character, poses a tantalizing question:
what if I told you that there are still dinosaurs among us?
Celeste will join Moon in a journey through time, and exciting adventure that will show them the Earth as it was in the very, very distant past.
They will see the fascinating transformations that these animals underwent over millions of years, creating giant creatures, armored beasts and super predators, until the day that a cataclysmic impact event caused a mass extinction on Earth.
But all is not lost. Celeste will discover the key to their survival.

title: SPECTRAL LURES BY CARLOS SERRANO / AV SHOWCASE
description:
A haunting and transformative experience, Spectral Lures challenges the line between the natural and the artificial, asking not just what we see, but how we perceive.
Spectral Lures is an experimental live audiovisual performance by Carlos Serrano that immerses audiences in a shifting space between illusion, memory and simulation. A flickering digital ghost emerges from the static of human data, infiltrating the sensory environment and transforming the architecture into a living and responsive system.
Blending real-time technologies such as Unreal Engine and TouchDesigner, the work unfolds as a 40-minute fulldome experience powered by 16.1 spatial audio. As the signal evolves, it adopts the audience itself as part of its network, blurring perception, dissolving boundaries, and redefining immersion as a psychological state.
Spectral Lures expands Serrano’s practice into a shared, collective space. Alongside the performance, the project includes an open workshop and artist talk, inviting audiences to explore the creative and ethical dimensions of live XR, synthetic vision and immersive storytelling.
There will be a Q&A with the artist after the presentation of the work.

Doors open: 7.30pm
Start time: 8.30pm
Finish time: 10pm

title: SUNRISE ON OTHER WORLDS BY SQUIDSOUP – IMMERSIVE INSTALLATION
description:
Sunrise on Other Worlds is an abstract immersive installation and performance by Squidsoup that envisions the sunrise and sunset cycles of imagined alien worlds. It transports audiences across distant terrains – gas giants, molten metallic landscapes, barren moons – in an unfolding, shifting rhythm of their days.
Extending ideas explored in Squidsoup’s Sola, Light Henge and Three Volumes, the piece takes the form of a looping, multi-movement experience inspired conceptually by Holst’s The Planets, and by the dramatic atmospheres of J. M. W. Turner and John Martin.
Drones and grand distorted guitars drift and evolve across a custom octophonic sound system, surrounding audiences in an immersive sonic field, while fields of colour emerge, dissolve, and shift between light and darkness – creating an environment that feels both monumental and intimate.
Sunrise on Other Worlds translates the complexity of other worlds into sensory experience, accessible through presence, perception, and imagination. It invites reflection on the vastness of the universe and our place within it, and offers a space for wonder.
There will be a Q&A with the artists after the show.
7th August 2026

Start time: 8.30pm

title: SOUNDS OF THE OCEAN / IMMERSIVE CINEMA
description:
Sounds of the Ocean – A Mindful Underwater Journey
Sounds of the Ocean is an award-winning immersive experience that invites you and your family to the heart of the deep blue sea guiding you to guide you on a mindful underwater odyssey.
Building on the success of the live performance, this film captures the magic of the original show.It is an invitation to forge a deep connection with the enchanting life that dwells beneath the waves. The immersive film combines sounds of whales & dolphins with music and ocean imagery to guide the audience on a mindful underwater odyssey.
Prepare to be captivated, uplifted, and transformed. Don’t miss your chance to be part of this unforgettable journey. Let the waves of serenity carry you away into a realm of boundless wonder.
Joshua Sam Miller is an award-winning Ocean artivist and immersive impact producer on a mission to connect people back to the natural world through the power of meaningful wellness experiences.  His major international touring project, Sounds of the Ocean, debuted at Burning Man 2019, has offered 300+ events across three continents and has been an Official UN Ocean Decade Activity since 2022.  As the founder of Embodied Sounds, Joshua fosters local, sustainable impact by building bridges between for-profit and non-profit organizations everywhere his work is showcased, including performing arts halls, science museums, aquariums, planetariums, film and music festivals around the world.
10% of the ticket will get donated to Oceana UK.
Suitable for ages 4+.

title: BEGINNER’S SUMMER COURSE / LIVE VIDEO FOR EVENTS WITH RESOLUME
description:
Live video for events with Resolume
This short course will kick-start your journey into video playback and manipulation for live events or content creation. In a move away from traditional video editing and processing, the VJ workflow is real-time, fast and fun to use.
We will look at the industry standard VJ software Resolume Avenue/Arena. This primarily gets used for concert and club visuals – but also finds its way into corporate event work, motion graphic production, projection mapping and live streaming. It attracts a wide range of creative and technical people that includes DJs, musicians, videographers, graphics designers, event producers, video technicians and audio-visual artists.
Starting from the ground up, we will become familiar with the interface – learning how to load, launch and mix video content. After the initial introduction we will build a basic performance project from scratch. From there we can add other types of material, video effects and physical controls to create a reactive performance that can be set to music or viewed on its own. We will also learn some of the technical aspects of working with video and how to develop a signature style and original content.
The workshop will be delivered by Nick Feldman, an experienced lecturer, course developer, course leader, and mentor with a strong track record in contemporary music education. He holds regular teaching positions at esteemed institutions including BIMM, the Guildhall School of Music & Drama, and the Institute of Contemporary Music Performance (ICMP).
What you will learn
– The history and development of live video.
– The project hierarchy and interface of Avenue/Arena.
– Building a custom VJ project from scratch.
– Using timelines and adding modulation.
– Applying MIDI mapping to physical controllers.
– Using video effects and generative sources.
– Using audio reactivity for added dynamism.
Dates:
Monday 10th of August and Tuesday 11th August 2026.
Timeframe:
10.30-17:00
Cost:
 £100 (£80 for concessions) + ticket fees
All ticket sales are final and non-refundable and non-exchangeable. Please review event details carefully before purchase. Thank you for your understanding.
Participants:
Max 16 people sign up – no prior experience and background required.
What you need to bring-
– Your own laptop (PC or Mac) and power lead.
– Pre-installed Resolume Avenue/Arena software (https://resolume.com/download/) – both versions are very similar, but Arena has a few pro features. The trial is free to download.
– Any video content, logos or images you want to work with (some will also be supplied).
– Any adaptors your laptop requires to output HDMI video or connect USB devices.
– Optional: MIDI controllers, headphones.
shortDescription: BEGINNER'S SUMMER COURSE / Live video for events with Resolume

title: BEGINNER’S SUMMER COURSE / ELECTRONIC MUSIC PERFORMANCE
description:
Electronic music performance with Ableton Live
This two day crash course will help demystify the process of building a custom live electronic music performance system that is based around use of Ableton Live. We will explore the various hardware and software options to enable live sequencing, arrangement, sound design and mixing. You will be encouraged to design and build your own bespoke setup, with opportunities for tailored feedback.
We will be using industry-standard software Ableton Live, which remains focused around a non-linear and live performance paradigm. The development path for performance can run in parallel with production work, so you are welcome to join this course at any stage of your music production journey. You do not need to be proficient in using Live but are expected to be familiar with the software – learning resources from Ableton, first steps guide.
The course is designed as a holistic overview of building a live performance system from the ground up, mirroring the progression from a reliance on playback through to more complex and improvisatory workflows. We will learn about using the Ableton Push controllers, as well as other physical control devices, to construct an ergonomic and intuitive system for real-time music creation. There will also be discussion around a hybrid or hardware-only system too, with a chance to try out different setups.
The workshop will be delivered by Nick Feldman, an experienced lecturer, course developer, course leader, and mentor with a strong track record in contemporary music education. He holds regular teaching positions at esteemed institutions including BIMM, the Guildhall School of Music & Drama, and the Institute of Contemporary Music Performance (ICMP).
What you will learn:
– An explanation of different live performance systems
– Designing and building a bespoke system using Ableton Live
– Working with audio for live remixes
– Integrating MIDI for more flexibility and improvisatory options
– MIDI mapping and working with controllers
– Integrating external instruments and effects
– Building and refining a full live show
Dates:
Monday 17th August and Tuesday 18th August 2026

10.30-17:00

 £100 (£80 for concessions) + ticket fees

– A version of Ableton Live installed on your machine – at least the 30 day trial
– Your own musical material to adapt and work with, otherwise resources will be supplied
– Wired headphones (and any adaptors)

title: THE BLACKOUT / LIVE IMMERSIVE PERFORMANCE
description:
CATALYST 360° / LIVE XR SHOWCASES
The Blackout / 15th Anniversary of Hope 
The Blackout bring their high energy presence to CULTVR with a performance that reflects both their legacy and a forward-looking approach to live music.
An internationally touring rock band from South Wales, The Blackout were originally active from 2003 to 2015 before reforming in 2022. Since their return, they have played major stages including Download Festival and Slam Dunk Festival, alongside a full UK tour, reaffirming their reputation as one of the UK’s most dynamic live acts. Across their career, they have toured extensively throughout the UK, Europe, USA, Australia and Japan, sharing stages with artists such as My Chemical Romance, Linkin Park, Limp Bizkit, All Time Low, Blink-182 and Bring Me The Horizon.
With three UK Top 40 albums: The Best in Town (2009), Hope (2011), and Start the Party (2013), the band have built a strong and enduring connection with audiences.
For CULTVR, The Blackout are exploring new ways to translate their live energy into innovative formats and this project reflects the band’s commitment to reimagining how audiences can experience music.

title: LAND EMPATHY / RICHARD CHAPPELL DANCE
description:
Land Empathy by Richard Chappell is a powerful interdisciplinary performance that combines live dance with 360° projection, bringing together the film Heart Land (BBC Arts) and Welsh climate change data from Living Wales. Rooted in themes of intergenerational activism and humanity’s environmental impact, the work transforms data into a visceral choreographic experience.
Developed through Chappell’s Clore Leadership Fellowship with the Centre for Alternative Technology, in collaboration with Dr Richard Lucas (Aberystwyth University), the piece responds directly to mapped ecological changes across Wales. Since its 2024 commission by Stomping Ground, Land Empathy has toured internationally, including appearances at Greenwich + Docklands International Festival, Dance International Glasgow, and Sismograf in Spain.
Inspired by the urgency of the climate crisis, the work explores how movement can deepen emotional and spiritual connections to the natural world. Through symbolic acts, such as dancers covering themselves in white and red clay, it expresses grief, responsibility, and compassion, ultimately embracing a message of resilience and renewal in the face of environmental loss. For its presentation at CULTVR, the evening unfolds across three distinct parts. It opens with Timewasters, a 20-minute interdisciplinary performance by Faye Tan and George Hampton Wale, exploring outdoor leisure and personal narrative. Supported by Arts Council Wales, the work brings a strong crossover audience from both dance and visual arts communities. The second part features Land Empathy, with Heart Land projected across the dome while dancers perform beneath it. The evening concludes with a post-performance discussion. This conversation will invite audiences to reflect on the intersections of technology, performance and activism, and the collaborative processes behind the work.
The evening also includes Who Do You Think I Am? is a 15-minute interactive acro-dance performance that blends live movement and augmented reality. Through the experience, audiences are invited to share their thoughts and reflections on migration, identity and belonging. In a world of increasingly polarised debates about immigration, the work creates space for conversation, empathy and reflection—encouraging audiences to consider different perspectives and question their own assumptions.
Date: 11th September 2026
Doors Open: 6.30pm
Performance Starts: 7.30pm
Q&A starts: 8.30pm
Performance Ends: 9.30pm

title: MINDSET BY NATALIE ROE & BETH LEWIS – LIVE IMMERSIVE PERFORMANCE
description:
MINDSET is an immersive concert combining Natalie Roe’s surround acoustic and electronic music with Beth Lewis’ vibrant 3D motion visuals. The performance explores the concept of mindset; ‘the established set of attitudes held by someone’ through a dynamic journey of emotional states and musical styles.
Rooted in live performance, the piece features live modular synthesiser spatialised in real-time and elements of live visual manipulation, bringing both risk and immediacy to the experience. Originally created for the Dora Stoutzker Hall at the Royal Welsh College of Music & Drama, MINDSET now evolves within CULTVR’s fully immersive environment, expanding its sensory impact.
This new iteration reflects five years of artistic development, with Natalie Roe and Beth Lewis reworking the music and visuals to relaunch the project and adapt it to site-specific spaces.
Natalie Roe – Modular Synthesiser, Electronic Instruments, Piano, Flute
Beth Lewis – Visuals, live spatialisation of sound

title: CELYN OF GWENT / LIVE PERFORMANCE
description:
Dying and Rising by Celyn of Gwent is a live solo immersive audiovisual performance combining electronic music, ethereal live voice, sound-reactive visuals and poetic monologues. The work is being newly adapted for fulldome presentation, expanding from its original format into a fully immersive spatial environment.
‘We will have no puff of smoke and bloodless resurrection.
We must tend a different garden from the poisoned soil.’
Rooted in an urgent artistic response to the climate crisis, the piece explores the intersection of ecology and identity in contemporary Britain through the perspective of a queer Welsh sonic artist and storyteller. It weaves together original songs, reinterpretations of traditional British Isles ballads, spoken word, and layered soundscapes incorporating urban field recordings.
Performed live, Dying and Rising integrates real-time electronic manipulation with a visual score created from processed footage filmed across Wales and London. The visuals are synchronised and driven through interactive software, allowing them to respond dynamically to the sonic material in performance.
The work has been developed with Mixing Engineer Helen Noir, alongside support from Help Musicians’ Next Level programme, R&D funding from Tŷ Cerdd in partnership with SHIFT Cardiff.  Dying and Rising is touring Wales and the UK with the support of Arts Council of Wales, to coincide with its Autumn 2026 studio album release.
Designed for audiences interested in boundary-pushing audiovisual performance, LGBTQ+ perspectives in contemporary art, traditional music reinterpretation and climate-conscious storytelling, Dying and Rising offers a powerful, evolving live experience where sound and image are tightly interwoven in real time.
 
Date: 25th September 2026
Doors Open: 19:30
Performance Starts: 20:30
Performance Ends: 10:00 ​

title: FDUK 2026 – IMMERSIVE FESTIVAL
description:
FDUK returns for 2026!
The UK’s premiere celebration of all things fulldome will be hosted at CULTVR Lab in October 2026.
FDUK 2026 will take place on Friday 9th and Saturday 10th of October and will feature the work of leading fulldome artists and producers from the UK and around the world. The event is a great opportunity to experience fulldome creativity in all its diversity, and to meet and learn from fellow immersive creatives.
FDUK 2026 will be a celebration of fulldome as an artistic medium, featuring film screenings, talks, demos, workshops, live immersive performances and interactive artworks. The festival has been running since 2010 so we are very pleased to welcome it to Wales for this edition. FDUK 2026 will provide an opportunity for national and international immersive practitioners to share their work, skills and experience with the wider community, and for creative and media professionals, students and anyone interested in immersive technologies and frameless media to network and learn from peers.
Early Bird tickets are available until the end of March 2026, so grab yours at the best price now!

title: GIVE US DANCE BY KRYSTAL S. LOWE, IKAMBA AND ONISMO MUHLANGA
description:
GIVE US DANCE is not a fixed performance. Each iteration is shaped in real time, driven by a live DJ set that continuously transforms the rhythm, mood and direction of the piece.
Set within a 360° visual environment, you are enveloped by stunning imagery of Wales’ green spaces. These calming, expansive landscapes create a grounding sensory backdrop, inviting you into a space of reflection, connection and openness.
Each DJ set becomes a unique sonic journey, weaving together rhythms from the African diaspora with electronic sounds from across the world. Movement unfolds throughout the space, with fifteen dancers dispersed among you . Each performer embodies a unique character, bringing their own intentions, energy, and responses to the evolving music.
There are no barriers between performer and spectator. You are invited to engage on your own terms, to move, observe or simply immerse yourselves in the experience. Your presence becomes essential, shaping the atmosphere and contributing to the collective energy of this performance.

There will be a Q&A with the artists after the show: Krystal S. Lowe, IKAMBA, and Onismo Muhlanga.
30th October 2026

Start time: 8.30pm
End time: 10pm

DEADEDZ at the Dome: A fully immersive night of live Grateful Dead music
DEADEDZ make their debut performance at CULTVR in 2026 on Halloween. Come to experience immersive visuals collide with the rich and free-flowing sonic blend of psychedelic Americana improvisational music that begat the ‘Jam Band’ movement.
Get on the bus for a journey through the cowboy songs, the folk rock classics, your favourite Garcia, Hunter penned classics and the pioneering jam anthems of the legendary Grateful Dead. Come immerse yourself in the sonic and visual rainbow full of sound like never before.
DEADEDZ are a collective of seasoned veteran musicians, based in South Wales who come together with a passion for celebrating the music of the Grateful Dead. DEADEDZ honour the Grateful Dead spirit of improvisation and innovation, continuing to push musical boundaries with each performance.

title: GEORGIA RUTH / LIVE IMMERSIVE PERFORMANCE
description:
Join Georgia Ruth for a visual and musical ‘house tour’ of her forthcoming album, Uncanny Valley, where the familiar begins to feel strange, and comfort is shadowed by unease.
Her new album is rooted in her home, following a move from Aberystwyth to a quiet suburban area on the rural outskirts. Reflecting on suburbia, Georgia explores the tension between domestic comfort and a wider sense of political and emotional instability. As a mother of three, she captures this duality with clarity, tracing the fragile balance between safety and fear.
The house itself becomes central to the work. Retaining the original décor of its previous owners, it exists as a kind of time warp, both comforting and disquieting. This setting shapes the album’s visual world, with photographic artwork by Abby Poulson, creating a subtle, Lynchian atmosphere where the ordinary feels quietly surreal.
For CULTVR, Georgia Ruth presents not simply a concert, but an invitation into the space behind the songs. Sound, image and place combine to create an intimate and atmospheric encounter.
Georgia Ruth has long been a distinctive voice in Welsh music. Writing and performing in both Welsh and English, she has built a reputation for crafting emotionally rich, atmospheric work that draws on landscape, memory, and identity. Her previous albums have earned critical acclaim and multiple award nominations, establishing her as one of Wales’ most compelling contemporary artists.
Date: 13th November 2026
Doors Open: 7.30pm
Performance Starts: 8.30pm
Performance Ends: 10pm
shortDescription: Georgia Ruth at CULTVR

title: TEDDY HUNTER / LIVE PERFORMANCE
description:
CULTVR presents Teddy Hunter in a special immersive showcase reimagining live performance for the dome.
Blending ambient electronics, live vocals and full-band instrumentation, Teddy Hunter transforms the space through multichannel sound and spatial audio, placing audiences inside an evolving sonic landscape.
Designed specifically for the dome environment, the performance features 360° ambient forest imagery, elemental textures, live-reactive visuals and real-time camera inputs, creating a fully immersive visual world that responds to the music in real time.
Built around a collection of ambient electronic songs performed with a full band, this experience moves beyond a traditional gig towards a part concert, part installation and part live art piece, marking the next step in Teddy Hunter’s future facing audiovisual journey.
Date:14th November
Doors Open: 7.30pm
Performance Starts: 8.30pm
Performance Ends: 10pm
shortDescription: Teddy Hunter at CULTVR

title: THE RIFT + THE VOYAGE OF ARKA KINARI – CLIMATE STORIES
description:
THE RIFT + THE VOYAGE OF ARKA KINARI – Immersive Films
Storytelling that moves, challenges and inspires.
Experience an evening of immersive cinema from 4Pi Productions, presenting two climate stories that bring the urgency of our changing planet to life. Featuring The Rift, winner at the New Images Festival in Paris and the acclaimed documentary The Voyage of Arka Kinari, recipient of a Special Jury Award at the Jena Fulldome Festival in Germany.

The Rift (8min)
Set against the rich and diverse landscapes of Zimbabwe, this striking dance film explores the tension, resilience and deep interconnectedness between people and the natural world in the face of climate change. Through movement, the performers embody the impact of environmental disruption, revealing the fragile yet profound bond that unites humanity and nature.

The Voyage of Arka Kinari (39 min)
Step aboard the 70-ton sailing vessel Arka Kinari, reimagined as a floating cultural platform dedicated to raising awareness of the climate crisis. Join acclaimed artists Filastine & Nova on a remarkable global journey, where music and art become tools for connection, activism, and resilience. Crossing oceans and cultures, their voyage highlights the urgent need for collective action through a shared creative language.
Date: 28 November 2026
Time: 1pm
All ages / Family Friendly
Doors open: 1 hour before the screening

title: Hayao Miyazaki's Dreams by Mystery Ensemble
description:
А unique  concert will take place on July 25th at 7:30 PM at the stunning Llandaff Cathedral in the heart of Cardiff.

The Miyazaki Dreams concert is an immersion in the fabulous atmosphere of anime of the world-famous Japanese director and Oscar winner Hayao Miyazaki. Mystery Ensemble has collected magical  music from his anime and compositions inspired by his creations.

The evening programme includes renowned works composed by ingenious Joe Hisaishi, including My Neighbour Totoro, the legendary anime Spirited Away, Howl’s Moving Castle, Laputa: Castle in the Sky and others. The programme also includes works by other composers inspired by Miyazaki’s artworks.

 Musical themes will take viewers into the atmospheres of famous anime stories and introduce brave heroines, magical creatures, and characters inspired by Japanese folklore.
shortDescription: Official tickets and information for Hayao Miyazaki's Dreams by Mystery Ensemble at Llandaff Cathedral from Ents24 - rated Excellent on Trustpilot.

title: Recomposed by Max Richter: Vivaldi, The Four Seasons
description:
A unique  concert will take place at the magnificent Llandaff Cathedral in the heart of Cardiff on the 22nd of August.

Join us for an evening featuring the famous Antonio Vivaldi cycle, The Four Seasons, in the unique interpretation of contemporary composer Max Richter, performed by the extraordinary Mystery Ensemble.

Max Richter is the composer of  music for dozens of feature films and documentaries. The European Film Academy voted him the best film composer in 2008. He reinterpreted Antonio Vivaldi's music in the spirit of minimalism and postmodernism. Recomposed by Max Richter: Vivaldi, The Four Seasons is one of Richter’s most famous works. After its release in 2012, the recording topped the iTunes Classical  Music charts in over 20 countries.
shortDescription: Official tickets and information for Recomposed by Max Richter: Vivaldi, The Four Seasons at Llandaff Cathedral from Ents24 - rated Excellent on Trustpilot.

title: Recomposed by Max Richter: Vivaldi, The Four Seasons
description:
A unique  concert will take place at the magnificent Llandaff Cathedral in the heart of Cardiff on the 22nd of August.

Join us for an evening featuring the famous Antonio Vivaldi cycle «The Four Seasons» in the unique interpretation of contemporary composer Max Richter, performed by the extraordinary Mystery Ensemble.

Max Richter is the composer of  music for dozens of feature films and documentaries. The European Film Academy voted him the best film composer in 2008. He reinterpreted Antonio Vivaldi's music in the spirit of minimalism and postmodernism. Recomposed by Max Richter: Vivaldi, The Four Seasons is one of Richter’s most famous works. After its release in 2012, the recording topped the iTunes  Classical Music charts in over 20 countries.

Max Richter has recorded 12 solo albums and performed at the London Barbican, the Paris Philharmonic, the Sydney Opera and the Amsterdam Concertgebouw, and among his projects are the Sum Opera and the Infra ballet (choreographed by Wayne MacGregor) at Covent Garden. Richter’s music is heard in many performances around the world, as well as in the films «Shutter Island» by Martin Scorsese, «Last Love on Earth» by David Mackenzie, and «Waltz with Bashir», for the soundtrack to which he received the award «Best Composer» from the European Film Academy.

The Four Seasons by Antonio Vivaldi is one of the most famous and frequently performed works of classical music.
shortDescription: Official tickets and information for Recomposed by Max Richter: Vivaldi, The Four Seasons at Llandaff Cathedral from Ents24 - rated Excellent on Trustpilot.

title: A Night at the Opera by Candlelight
description:
Immerse yourself in the enchanting world of  opera with a captivating showcase of timeless classics that will transport you to the grandeur of the stage. This mesmerising opera highlights show brings together the most iconic pieces from legendary composers, promising an unforgettable evening of vocal brilliance and emotive storytelling.

Join a Night at the Opera, where each piece is a precious gem, meticulously chosen to showcase the depth and diversity of the  operatic experience.

Let the melodies resonate in your heart and soul, as the performers transport you to a world of passion, drama, and exquisite musicality.

Programme Puccini - "Nessun Dorma" from Turandot Delibes - “Flower Duet” from Lakme Mozart - Marriage of Figaro overture Puccini - “O Mio Babbino Caro” from Gianni Schicchi Rossini - Barber of Seville Overture Verdi - “La donna e mobile” from Rigoletto Bizet - Habanera from Carmen Puccini - “Un Bel Di Vedremo” from Madame Butterfly Puccini - “E Lucevan le Stelle” from Tosca And many, many more!

title: Seriously Collins - The Candlelight Concert
description:
Experience the magic of two  musical legacies intertwined in one unforgettable evening and step into a world illuminated by the soft, flickering glow of hundreds of candles as we celebrate the timeless hits of Phil Collins and Genesis.

This timeless  concert focuses on the raw emotion and brilliant songwriting that defined an era.

Expect a masterful performance featuring an incredible lead vocalist and a world-class live band from ‘Seriously Collins’ where every note is delivered with the passion and precision these legendary songs deserve, from the driving energy of Invisible Touch and Land of Confusion to the soulful depths of In the Air Tonight and Against All Odds, prepare to hear your favorite anthems like never before.

Whether you are a lifelong fan of the progressive rock roots of Genesis or the chart-topping solo pop brilliance of Phil Collins, this evening promises to be a powerful tribute to musical excellence.

Join us for a night of nostalgia, soul and pure musical artistry.

title: Tim Burton's Universe by Mystery Ensemble - 7.30pm show
description:
Welcome to the fantastical worlds of Tim Burton! We invite you to celebrate this Halloween weekend on a journey through the  music that made it unforgettable. ? unique  concert will take place in the majestic Llandaff Cathedral, located in the heart of Cardiff.

From the shimmering wonder of Alice in Wonderland to the festive magic of The Nightmare Before Christmas, from the haunting lyricism of Edward Scissorhands to the eccentric brilliance of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory - this concert immerses you in the soundscapes that shaped Burton’s unique cinematic universe. 

At the heart of it all is the music of Danny Elfman, Burton’s lifelong collaborator and one of the most distinctive film composers of our time. Elfman’s music blends playfulness with menace, tenderness with grandeur - a perfect mirror of Burton’s visual imagination. Alongside Elfman, highlights include unforgettable moments from Corpse Bride, the cult favourite Beetlejuice, the gothic sweep of Batman, and the razor-sharp drama of Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street.

In this premiere, Mystery Ensemble brings Burton’s worlds to life in unique arrangements. Expect soaring voices, bold instrumental colours,
shortDescription: Official tickets and information for Tim Burton's Universe by Mystery Ensemble - 7.30pm show at Llandaff Cathedral from Ents24 - rated Excellent on Trustpilot.
